programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Vision Confusion
programme.desc: Lauren wants to look like a 'classy porn star' at her wedding, but she's in for a surprise. Bride Cheryl only knows what she does not want her wedding dress to look like. Bride Amanda hopes her custom gown lives up to the vision in her mind.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Booby Trap
programme.desc: Danielle's size 34, J-cup chest is blowing her budget sky high. Stephanie wants to show off the goods, but her mother certainly does not. Christie purchased a dress to flaunt her bust, but after losing weight, she hopes it still does.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Situation in the Salon
programme.desc: Mike 'The Situation' Sorrentino arrives at Kleinfeld to help younger sister Melissa find her wedding gown, but he and his brothers keep stealing her spotlight. Meanwhile, bride-to-be Ashley is upstaged by her flower girl's custom-made Pnina dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Daddy Dearest
programme.desc: Emily and her very opinionated father want the perfect princess ball gown for her big day. Bride Danielle's father passed away, and she hopes to find a gown he would have loved.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Please Love My Dress
programme.desc: Marlene wants a feathered ball gown, but her parents prefer something traditional. Jessica loves every dress she tries on, but her family does not! Angelina likes a bohemian gown, but no one in her group is on board.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Love at First Sight
programme.desc: HuffPost Live correspondent and host Caitlyn Becker is torn between the first two dresses she tries on. Candace declares the first gown she wears is her dream dress. Fitting bride Danielle hopes she still loves the first dress she tried on and bought.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Case of Dress Distress
programme.desc: Jamie is devastated when she falls in love with an over-budget gown her bossy bridesmaid picks out. Natalie has trouble committing to a dress in the absence of her ill mother. Fitting bride Nadia is nervous her reception gown will be the wrong colour.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: V.I.Pnina
programme.desc: Sometimes when Kleinfeld is closed the salon will specially open the doors for clients with unlimited budgets to have private appointments with their designers. Pnina Tornai meets individually with three budget-less brides for a record-breaking day.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Performances Piece
programme.desc: Tony Danza makes his debut at the salon to help his Broadway co-star find the perfect bridal costume for her role in their new musical, 'Honeymoon in Vegas.' Ballerina Valerie wants a wedding gown that is nothing like her princess dance costumes.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Designer Dreams
programme.desc: Liz is in the salon with Danielle Jonas, and wants to show off her new body. Courtney Cason said yes to Mark Zunino's sketch, but now it's time to try on the real gown. Jillian wants a fashion forward dress but her mom isn't making it easy.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: The Sale Is on
programme.desc: Women come from all over the country for Kleinfeld's famous sample sale where they can buy gorgeous gowns at rock bottom prices. These brides have just three hours to sort through hundreds of designer options in the quest to find their dream dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Sexy Sells
programme.desc: Nik Wallenda pushes for his wife Erendira to choose a sexy gown – within limits! Amy returns for a dress that's even racier than her last one, but her twin still begs her to cover up. Jaya is hesitant to adhere to her fiancé's form fitting preference.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Like Mother, Unlike Daughter
programme.desc: Valerie's budget is unlimited thanks to Dad, but Mom disagrees with her sexy dress choices. Bride Napiera wants a ball gown, but both her mother and former TV mom' think form fitting is best.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Drama, Drama, Drama!
programme.desc: WyQuasia's family spends more time bickering with each other than listening to what the bride wants! Shelley's enormous entourage all have so many opinions they make dress shopping impossible. Bride Zabrina's mother demands her custom gown be redesigned.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: The Ultimate Gypsy-Gorger-Gypsy Love Triangle
programme.desc: Cearia plans to wed gorger fiancé Sam, but is soon in a love triangle when her cousin Kyle proclaims that they should be together. Mom Angie plans a party for her daughter Jewel, hoping to find her a Gypsy husband, but Jewel is secretly seeing a gorger.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: Gypsy Sisters Bridal Brawl
programme.desc: The Stanley family returns. Nukkie has left Pookie and is now engaged to a gorger, but war could ensue if Mellie and Annie crash her bridal shower party. When Jewel chooses to marry fellow Gypsy Nick, her former gorger suitor Josiah hatches a bold plan.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: Surprise, You're Getting Married
programme.desc: Nukkie's wedding to Jonas may be in jeopardy after an ex re-enters their lives. When the problems fall onto sister Dallas's shoulders it's a wild race to the altar. Gypsy mom Jett locks horns with her own mother over her little girl's birthday party.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: My Daughter's Not Marrying a Jailbird
programme.desc: Jett and Bubba are in a rush to wed before his jail sentence, but Jett's mom Angie has plans to stop the union. Gypsy mother Mona Lisa is throwing her daughter a coming-of-age party, but first, Mona Lisa Jr. needs to reclaim her self-confidence.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: After the Rain Comes the Rainbow
programme.desc: Gypsy Samantha can't wait to marry her gorger fiancée Bridgette, but Samantha's sister may just ruin the big day. Lexi's chances of meeting a future husband at her Sweet 16 party might be halted by her protective older brother.

programme.title: Mom: Cinderella and a Drunk MacGyver

programme.title: Mom: Death, Death, Death and a Bucket of Chicken
programme.desc: Christy tries to be supportive when a health scare throws Bonnie into a tailspin.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: A Stunted Childhood and a Can of Fancy Mixed Nuts
programme.desc: When Sheldon learns that people with stunted childhoods can turn into social outcasts, he tries to act like a kid. Also, Meemaw and Dr. Sturgis’ relationship is tested when she teaches him how to drive.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: A Race of Superhumans and a Letter to Alf

programme.title: Young Sheldon: A Tummy Ache and a Whale of a Metaphor
programme.desc: When Sheldon has to spend a few days in the hospital, he turns into the world’s worst patient. Also, Missy gets a taste of what life would be like without her twin.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: A Nuclear Reactor and a Boy Called Lovey

programme.title: Young Sheldon: David, Goliath and a Yoo-Hoo From the Back
programme.desc: Sheldon uses his new friendship with the school bully to boss Georgie around. Also, Missy steals Meemaw’s makeup for picture day.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: A Math Emergency and Perky Palms
programme.desc: Sheldon and Dr. Sturgis have their first fight when Dr. Sturgis marks a question wrong on Sheldon’s test. Also, Mary takes over for Pastor Jeff while he's out sick.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Splinter/ Slide Whistle Stooges
programme.desc: SpongeBob accidentally gets a splinter, but he's afraid Mr. Krabs will send him home.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Nasty Patty/ Idiot Box

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: To Love a Patty/ Breath of Fresh Squidward
programme.desc: SpongeBob makes the perfect Krabby Patty; Squidward begins to get on everyone's nerves.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sweet and Sour Squidward/ The Googly Artiste
programme.desc: Plankton tries to befriend Squidward so he can get the Krabby Patty formula. When an art critic deems Patrick a true artiste for his rocks-with-googly-eyes creations, everyone in Bikini Bottom clamours for a Patrick original.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Fury: Lost Signal
programme.desc: The Rangers intercept a mysterious message from outer space and Zayto is desperate to know if it was sent from his home planet. Unable to decipher it and losing hope, he remembers another important message from the past.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Thing/ Hocus Pocus
programme.desc: When Squidward is totally covered in mud, leaves and gunk, the residents of Bikini Bottom think he's some sort of monster coming to terrorize the town. Later, Spongebob gets a brand new magic kit and, after practicing all day, tries to show off.

programme.title: The Loud House: Stall Monitor/ A Pimple Plan
programme.desc: Worried that his teacher has bad things to say about him, Lincoln tries to delay his parent-teacher conference. Luan wakes up with a pimple on the day of her first date with Benny, so she turns to the siblings for help.

programme.title: The Loud House: Mega Music
programme.desc: Eleven year old Lincoln Loud shows you how to survive the chaos of ten sisters.

programme.title: The Loud House: A Star is Scorned/ Senior Moment
programme.desc: When Lola realizes that double the cuteness could help her break into show business, she teams up with Lily. Lori regrets everything she hasn't done in high school, and vows to make up for lost time.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Guilt Trip/ Short Cut
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne and her primos try to win Maria a trip around the world./ When Carlota fails at hair cutting, she trains with the master barber himself – CJ.

programme.title: The Loud House: Exchange of Heart/ Community Disservice
programme.desc: Clyde arranges for an exchange student to stay with them; Lola takes a timid classmate under her wing.

programme.title: The Loud House: Singled Out/ Brave the Last Dance
programme.desc: Feeling like a third wheel when her teammates find significant others, Lynn seeks a boyfriend just to fit in. Clyde recruits Lincoln and the gang to find out if a girl he has a crush on at school feels the same way.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: High Sea Diving/ Bottle Burglars
programme.desc: SpongeBob wants to be the first sponge to dive all the way up to the surface of the ocean. When SpongeBob Squidward accidentally let Plankton steal the secret formula, it's up to them to steal it back.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Squirrel Jelly/The String
programme.desc: SpongeBob pulls a string that never seems to end from Squidward's shit.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Cave Dwelling Sponge/ The Clam Whisperer
programme.desc: When a prehistoric Sponge is unfrozen, he causes chaos all over town, and only SpongeBob can communicate with him. A flock of clams descend on Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Restraining SpongeBob/ Fiasco

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mutiny on the Krusty/ The Whole Tooth
programme.desc: When a storm sweeps the Krusty Krab away, its crew and customers need Krabs to lead them home. Patrick's last baby tooth needs to come out, but he's afraid to let it go.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pull Up a Barrel/ Company Picnic

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Whale Watching/ Krusty Kleaners

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Nitwitting/ The Ballad of Filthy Muck

programme.title: Heavy Metal Monsters: Steel vs. Snow

programme.title: Heavy Metal Monsters: Hercules
programme.desc: The Prinoth Panther is the ultimate all-terrain, multi-purpose work vehicle. It’s a crane, it’s a tractor, it’s a digger, it’s anything you need it to be. Then, a construction company is building an underground pipeline using the Tesmec 1075 trencher.

programme.title: Heavy Metal Monsters: Wrecking Crew

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Chain Saw
programme.desc: Al Quiring and sons become heavy rescue lumberjacks when a dump truck and trailer crash into a dense bush. Gord Boyd helps Team Green overcome environmental obstacles and a twisted wreck trapped in the trees.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Oil and Water
programme.desc: In Hope, Jamie, Colin and Cam battle heavy rains to recover a rolled semi blocking the highway through town; with traffic to The Coq cut off and a trailer full of cooking oil starting to rip, Jamie's crew must get the road open.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Return to Sender
programme.desc: A parcel delivery truck is torn open, sending packages across The Coq. Reliable Towing must overcome high winds, high speed traffic, and the threat of falling rocks to clear the wreck.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Thin Ice

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Door to Door

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Sub Zero

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Lives on the Line

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Double Crossed

programme.title: Fast Foodies: Amanda Seales
programme.desc: The three chefs aim to recreate Taco Bell's Cheesy Gordita Crunch for Amanda Seales.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stripteased
programme.desc: Find out what prop Q asked to keep from the dental damn challenge, what glazed delight is known to give Joe great power and how a doctor's appointment inspired Murr's striptease punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: Find out where Joe originally wanted to play hide n' seek, what Q's favourite dessert is, and what the crew was most afraid of during Murr's wig-pulling punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out what singer Q is obsessed with, what Sal's secret ingredient to fake vomit is, and why the Jokers in Yonkers had to muffle their laughter.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: A behind the scenes look at the location that refused to let the Jokers film, Joe's injury from being thrown into a tower of cereal and why Q was called a 'loose cannon'.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Washed Up
programme.desc: How the phrase “rooty toot toot” became popular on set, which guy has recently cut his potato intake in half, and how Joe managed to cool off during his sweltering bikini car wash punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: A last-minute prop request that caused a scramble, where Murr’s fetching housecoat came from, and who was offered a job at the children’s museum following Q’s turtle punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Like a Boss
programme.desc: Why the slow-moving line at The Fast and the Furious ride made things harder for the guys, who officiated Joe's wedding, and why last-minute changes were needed for Murr's Tumblr punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: Find out which joker owned a bar in Staten Island, what had the crew crying laughing and whose dad grew up on a chicken farm.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a bike but won't ride it in the city, how Murr gets around backstage while on tour and what Murr's building staff refused to do during his punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hump Day
programme.desc: Learn how the crew attracted more customers to eat at GRK, what piece of iconic 'Jokers' history was made in this same focus group space and who caused several delays in the filming of Q's zoo punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q pull desk duty, and then do strangers a solid by barring them from the bathroom. Plus, the big loser learns the hard way that gratuity is not included.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Blue Man Dupe
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Q and Sal are a little too generous with fellow shoppers at the market, then ask strangers to help them out of a texting jam. Plus, the big loser fights his way, repeatedly, to the best seat in the house.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Off the Reservation
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Joe and Sal participate in a fake documentary, then find themselves in the middle of a marshmallow throwing contest. Plus, tonight's big loser is the host with the least when he can't find customers' dinner reservations.

programme.title: Fast Foodies: Amanda Seales

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sucks for You

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Prize Fighter
programme.desc: The guys get their checks bounced by customers who notice unusual charges, then help out coworkers with some peculiar trust exercises. Later, the big loser finds himself deep at a carnival game that's rigged for him to lose.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bleach for America

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Elevating the Game
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes as the guys take over the register at a burger joint. Plus, find out how they pulled off Sal's secret elevator punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Bigger in Texas
programme.desc: The guys head to the Lone Star State in a special episode that proves even embarrassment is bigger in Texas. And it's a real drag for tonight's loser at what is definitely his first rodeo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Parks and Wreck
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes as the guys cannonball into an uncomfortable poolside encounter. Tonight's loser presents a shocking senior citizen initiative to a community planning board.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Coward
programme.desc: The guys show who's boss at a fast food joint and whisper sweet nothings at a grocery store. Then, the big loser helps a cow in labor, and almost buys the farm.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins What We Learned in School
programme.desc: Adam shows that Columbus didn't discover America, King Tut was a dud, and the rules of grammar are not as ironclad as you'd think.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Justice
programme.desc: After getting Emily out of prison, Adam and his sister Rhea take on the justice system, shining a spotlight on the infamous McDonalds hot coffee lawsuit, and the substantial problems with the jury duty system.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Weight Loss
programme.desc: Adam illustrates all the reasons low-fat diets can actually make you fatter, and why counting calories is a waste of time.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Conspiracy Theories

programme.title: Kourtney & Kim Take Miami: Miami Vices
programme.desc: Kim takes her love of detective work to another level when she works with a private eye. Scott's eye problems lead to a new fashion accessory and Kourtney's post pregnancy weight gain starts to get to her.

programme.title: Kourtney & Kim Take Miami: Lord Disick in the House
programme.desc: Khloe lands a hosting job on 'The X-Factor' that turns out to be more stressful than she thought it would be. Scott decides to give Lord Disick a royal Miami introduction and Kim and Kourtney get competitive on a trip to London.

programme.title: Movie: He's Just Not That Into You
programme.desc: Several young women and men, from committed relationships and singles, try to understand the signals and the intentions of the other sex. A variety of situations and misunderstandings develop the truth about dating in the modern world.

programme.title: Movie: The Wedding Singer
programme.desc: After being stood up at the altar, Robby's entire world is turned upside down. Performing for wedding receptions and bar mitzvahs only serves as a constant reminder of his unhappiness, until he meets and falls in love with a waitress named Julia.

programme.title: Movie: He's Just Not That Into You
programme.desc: Several young women and men, from committed relationships and singles, try to understand the signals and the intentions of the other sex. A variety of situations and misunderstandings develop the truth about dating in the modern world.

programme.title: Kourtney & Kim Take Miami: See You Later, Alligator
programme.desc: Scott hits the swamps of Florida to hunt for alligators. Kim's desire to stay in fashion leads her to spend her savings and Kourtney reveals her post baby body during a bikini photo shoot.

programme.title: Kourtney & Kim Take Miami: Babies, Lies and Alibis (Part One)
programme.desc: Kim suspects that Scott is up to no good and hires a private detective to follow him. Meanwhile, Kourtney considers being a surrogate for Khloe.

programme.title: Kourtney & Kim Take Miami: Babies, Lies and Alibis (Part Two)
programme.desc: Family finds out that Kim hired a private investigator to follow Scott; big news revealed.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Keeping Up: Kardashians on Vacation
programme.desc: Travel around the world with Kim and the gang, as the defining moments from each of the Kardashian family vacations are recapped.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: We're Having a Baby
programme.desc: The family is overjoyed about Kim's pregnancy, but Kim’s surprising behavior makes them wonder if she feels the same way. Plus, the sex of Kim's baby is revealed.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Enough Is Enough
programme.desc: After some nasty tabloid rumors about Kris surface, Kim and Khloe step in to defend their mother. Meanwhile, Brody tries to open up to Bruce about their past problems and Kim volunteers to help Rob lose weight.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Agree to Disagree
programme.desc: Kris and Bruce get the whole family involved in their disagreement over whether or not to have a gun in the house. Meanwhile, Kim suffers a health scare while dealing with her divorce.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Papa, Can You Hear Me?
programme.desc: Bruce is finally forced to deal with his hearing loss. Meanwhile, Scott hears about a woman with cancer who wants to meet him, Khloe welcomes a new puppy to the family, and Kris worries she might have a stalker.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: I Will Fix You
programme.desc: Kris worries about Rob’s recent behavior and takes steps to help him. Meanwhile, Khloe tries to get to the bottom of Kendall and Kylie’s issues with each other and Scott’s fears threaten his racing career.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Some Moms Just Wanna Have Fun
programme.desc: With Kourtney and Kim bonding over babies, Khloe feels left out and turns to Kris for a fun night out.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Home Is Where Your Mom Is
programme.desc: Kim learns her new house will not be ready in time for the baby and must come up with an alternate plan.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Greece Is the Word
programme.desc: The family is excited about their vacation to Greece, but tensions between Kris and Brody threaten to spoil the fun.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Greece Him Up
programme.desc: While in Greece, Kris gets overly-friendly with Brody, who finally confronts her about unfinished business. Meanwhile, Khloe and Kourtney decide to stop being chicken, face their fears, and make this vacation one to remember.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Opa!
programme.desc: With only days left on the vacation, Scott finally shows up to Greece. Kendall feels like she’s being left out of the family fun and is missing out on a bonding experience with Brody.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Life's a Beach (House)
programme.desc: Kris disagrees with Kendall’s plan to escape their hectic house and find a beach house for the summer, while Brandon and Brody start work on Bruce’s backyard putting green behind Kris’s back.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Kris' Mother-in-Law
programme.desc: Kris worries about a visit with Bruce’s mom, Esther, because they’ve never had much of a relationship in the past.

programme.title: Tournament of Champions: Guy at Home Watch Party: Final Eight Revealed
programme.desc: Host Guy Fieri takes the Tournament of Champions to the next level as an intense second round begins. Pressure mounts for the final eight chefs as the competition and judging get tougher, and a shocking result makes it clear that no chef is safe.

programme.title: Tournament of Champions: Guy at Home Watch Party: Down to the Top Four
programme.desc: Host Guy Fieri continues the tournament, with the battles growing fiercer. One promising chef learns the hard way that there's no margin for error.

programme.title: Tournament of Champions: A Champion Is Crowned
programme.desc: Host Guy Fieri concludes the Tournament of Champions with two stunning semi-final battles and an epic finale that rocks the food world and crowns an unforgettable new champion.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: A Taste of Everywhere
programme.desc: Guy Fieri tracks down international dishes done Triple-D style: A combination Jamaican/Chinese joint in Florida; Home made Polish pierogi at a basic bar in Pittsburgh; and a Mexican restaurant in Utah where the specialty is seven kinds of mole.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Not Your Everyday Eats
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is hitting the road and taking a detour to find some out-of-the-ordinary eats. In Chico, California, a Hawaiian-Asian fusion spot serving up righteous ramen and a fried chicken bao.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Seafood and Savory
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's grabbing some off-the-hook seafood and savory sensations in Miami, Fla.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Fresh and Funky
programme.desc: Host Guy Fieri visits one of his favourite ocean-side spots serving up fresh Dungeness crab in San Francisco, CA. Also, in Charlotte, NC, where they boil turkeys and finally in Reno, NV where they make fresh granola.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: BBQ and More
programme.desc: Green mesquite smoked classics in Austin; a railroad car turned BBQ shack in California.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Griddles n' Vittles
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's headed west for barbecue and beyond. In Los Angeles, a food court gem grills up homemade chorizo and a Yucatan turkey special. Then, in Las Vegas, Nevada, two funky joints fire up the grill.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Savory Meat and a Little Sweet
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is digging into both meat and sweet, starting in Sioux Falls, SD, where a market-butcher eatery is serving a culinary extravaganza. Then, in Fargo, ND, a bakery cafe is scratch-making sticky pecan rolls and a savory French pastry dish.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Mozz to Matzo Balls
programme.desc: A 1920's candy and ice cream place that's added mozzarella sticks and rigatoni.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Flavor Adventure
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's taking a culinary trip filled with adventurous flavour. In Los Angeles, a funky spot is all about filling bowls with eclectic eats. In Norfolk, Virginia, a market and restaurant has Mexican specialties that you probably haven't seen before.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: You Picked 'Em
programme.desc: Revisiting favourites from past episodes such as the family restaurant in Oklahoma.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Breakfast-Dinner Mash-Up
programme.desc: Trisha's invited her friend and social media manager Bryan over as her official taste tester. They're making wildly inventive meals that fuse together breakfast and dinner ingredients. Recipes include corn cakes and country ham scramble.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Music City With Jeff Mauro
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood gives her pal Jeff Mauro the inside scoop on what makes the Music City sing by taking him to the Nashville club where she first got signed.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Jet Lag Dinner
programme.desc: After a week of non-stop travel, Valerie Bertinelli isn't sure what time zone she's in, so she decides a sweet and savory breakfast-for-dinner will make a nice homecoming to share with her husband, Tom.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Lights, Camera ... Eat!
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli is developing new, foolproof recipes for her website. She makes a batch of savory morning muffins and kale caesar salad with garlicky panko topping along with pork tenderloin steaks with mustard cider sauce.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Quick and Easy: One Pan
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is focusing on quick and easy one-pan meals, starting with fresh and crunchy turkey taco lettuce wraps with Pico de Gallo.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Chuck's Dinner
programme.desc: Ree Drummond's focus is on Chuck, her father-in-law, as the family helps him work cattle and she makes him dinner.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Speedy Seafood 4 Ways
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is all about speedy seafood done four ways, and she starts by whipping up snappy coconut shrimp and mango dipping sauce.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Taste of Tex Mex
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is serving up her favorite Tex-Mex recipes, starting with spicy shrimp and grits the whole family loves. She also makes incredible and incredibly easy chicken and veggie sheet pan fajitas with all the fixins.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Midwest Delicatesse
programme.desc: Molly Yeh and her husband, Nick, are missing the Big Apple, especially the food. So to crush the craving, she whips up pastrami sandwiches with onion rings, hearty chicken kreplach soup and, for dessert, beautiful black and pink cookies.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: The Big Till
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is making an easy and hearty lunch for the Hagen family farmers, and she's using some of her favorite pantry staples- with a twist.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: There's Nothing Like Home Cooking
programme.desc: Kardea Brown treats her friend to some Southern home cooking. The meal includes lemon and garlic baked chicken, country wild rice with sausage and collard greens with tomatoes. For dessert, Kardea makes Upside down peach cornbread cake.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Dishes That Keep Giving
programme.desc: Kardea Brown makes the most of a free day by preparing dishes that make perfect leftovers. First up is chicken pot pie, and she makes plenty of cheesy country ham grit balls with spicy mayo and some pan-roasted sage and butternut squash.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Skillets, Bakes and Casseroles
programme.desc: The Kitchen hosts are sharing their favorite regional casseroles, bakes and skillets with fresh side dish options, too. The menu includes New York-inspired cheesy spinach manicotti with lemon and a southern chili cornbread Skillet.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Winter Weeknight Warrior
programme.desc: Jeff Mauro shares his one-pan plan with a Pierogi Reuben Skillet Dish, while Sunny Anderson shares her Honey Chipotle Bean Burritos.

programme.desc: Three pairs of rival chefs who previously faced off one-on-one return. First, two budget brawlers settle the score in a round that has them shopping for ingredients under five dollars for their family dinners.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Tia's Favorites: Tear-Jerkers

programme.title: North Woods Law: Triple Threat
programme.desc: Up north, Sgt. Lucas checks duck hunters. Down south, Officer Benvenuti and Trainee Crouse question a man suspected of hunting over bait. Later, Sgt. Lucas and Officer Holmes attempt to free a cub stuck inside a trap before its mother returns.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Frozen Over
programme.desc: Officer Hannett patrols for ice fishermen while Lt. Boudreau investigates a hunter who shot towards a road. Officer Holmes deals with a raccoon hiding in a warm chimney. And later, Officer St. Pierre goes on his first dive recovery under the ice.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Treacherous Trails
programme.desc: During a busy winter weekend, Lt. Boudreau encounters kite skiers, an illegal fire sled and a vandalized bob-house. Officer Canfield searches for a deer with an arrow in its head. Then, Officers Demler and Towne head our on a mountain rescue.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Taking the Bait
programme.desc: Officer Masucci and Major Walsh join forces to summon a man for baiting without a permit. Officer Bronson pursues a pair of ATV speedsters riding with a toddler with no safety gear, and Lieutenant Cheney responds to a call about a deer wedged in a fence.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Snow Way Out
programme.desc: Officers Bronson and Towne get more than they bargained for with a speeding snowmobiler. The K-9 unit performs winter training. Officer MacFadzen patrols an ice drag racing event. Then, Officer Cyrs heads into the woods to investigate a hit and run.

programme.title: North Woods Law: No Place Like Home
programme.desc: During a busy "Old Home Day", Officer Delmer patrols the ATV trails. Officer McFazden rescues a trapped barred owl and takes it to be rehabilitated. On Mount Liberty, Officer Towne and trainee LaTourneau save an injured hiker.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Lake Collision
programme.desc: Officer Bronson investigates a teen's social media post, boasting of illegally shooting a deer. Officer Canfield confronts a hunter over multiple violations. And, the dive team searches for a boat and its driver after a collision with another boat.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Deceived
programme.desc: Game wardens attempt to catch a running deer before it hurts itself. The wardens investigate an impersonation case in which a man claims to be one of their own. While patrolling Lake Tawakoni, Richards comes across a suspicious group.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Passing the Torch
programme.desc: As Warden Richards reminisces on his career during the last day on the job, he races to rescue a cow being attacked by a pack of hunting dogs. At the academy, new recruits wrangle a gator, while anglers are caught illegally fishing.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: So Many Deer, Such Little Time

programme.title: Counting Cars: Ready, Set, Van Gogh!

programme.desc: The summertime is a time when the harshest environments on Earth temporarily become favourable for most. While the sun never sets, life speeds up for polar wildlife in a race to raise their young.

programme.title: Frozen Planet: Autumn
programme.desc: For the animals of the Polar Regions, time is running out in the autumn. The Arctic Ocean freezes over and the sea ice advances around Antarctica.

programme.title: Frozen Planet: Winter
programme.desc: There is no greater challenge for life than winter in the Polar Regions. As temperatures plummet to 70 degrees below zero Fahrenheit, witness the greatest test of survival on the planet.

programme.title: Snow Animals
programme.desc: Liz Bonnin introduces a cast of charismatic animals to reveal the remarkable strategies they use to survive, and even thrive, through the winter.

programme.title: Frozen Planet: To the Ends of the Earth

programme.title: Hidden Habitats: Yellowstone

programme.title: Chimps of the Lost Gorge
programme.desc: A family lives in a deep, ancient forested gorge in Uganda, that runs through Africa's savannah, of which has been cut off from the rest of the jungle for 15 years.

programme.title: Baby Chimp Rescue: Miracles Can Happen

programme.title: Baby Chimp Rescue: Breaking Point
programme.desc: At the chimpanzee rescue, the team now has twenty-eight chimps to look after, including an eight week-old baby called Gaia. A deadly cold breaks out among the babies, and the team rescues an adult male chimp called Jonny.

programme.title: Baby Chimp Rescue: A New Beginning

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Antarctica

programme.desc: A wealthy executive comes into conflict with his neighbors when he forbids them access to his extensive lands. One local handyman fights to keep the roads and trails open for all, a struggle that ends when one man lies dead.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Trailing the Devil
programme.desc: A nightmare wreaks havoc on the village of Armada, Michigan when 14-year-old April Millsap is found murdered on the community's most popular bike trail. Very little evidence leaves investigators running down clues to bring this monster to justice.

programme.title: Southern Gothic: Creek Runs Red
programme.desc: After a Tennessee fisherman finds a woman's body floating in a creek, family secrets, decades-long feuds, and a suspicious funeral shine light on a complex conspiracy. But the truth is far more shocking than anyone could have ever imagined.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: He's Out There

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Deadly Isolation

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Fatal Fixation
programme.desc: When Ignacio Garraus meets Shawna Nelson, there's instant heat – despite them both being married to other people. While he's just looking for a good time, she's falling in love.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: Some Kind of Monster
programme.desc: When Manjit Basra and Mukhtiar Panghali settle down and start a family, it seems like a dream come true. But this dream turns into a nightmare, with a heart-breaking ending that leaves everyone questioning what they thought they knew.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Cabin in the Woods
programme.desc: Sandra never expected such extreme reprisals from Norman, a man she once called her partner. But when her daughter is caught in the crosshairs, no one can predict how far Norman will go.

programme.desc: Two married church volunteers put their faith and families on the line for an affair that leads to expulsion from their church and community.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Married With Secrets
programme.desc: The dark past of a college student's new husband rears its ugly head and ends in a double homicide.

programme.title: Deadly Devotion: Supremacist Sin
programme.desc: When 25-year-old Christy Brown falls hard for Dave Mitchamore, she soon learns his love for her is only matched by his devotion to the Aryan Brotherhood of Texas, a violent white supremacist gang.

programme.title: Deadly Devotion: The Preacher's Wives
programme.desc: Joy Risker is young, in love and following God's plan when she becomes the second wife of a dynamic Christian Polygamist pastor, Sean Goff - who will go to any length keep Joy's independent streak from threatening his fledgling polygamist flock.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Cabin Fever
programme.desc: After they fail to turn up for an annual maple tapping celebration, Ian and Nancy Blackburn's lifeless bodies are discovered stuff into the trunk of their own car. The whirlwind investigation will unmask a monster who hid in plain sight.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Silent Witness
programme.desc: Cleveland 911 receives call from a panicked woman saying a mysterious man forced his way into her home and shot her boyfriend in front of their kids. Detectives have to untangle a twisted web of jealousy to find out who killed this young father and why.

programme.title: Dark Waters: Murder in the Deep: Burned
programme.desc: After a whirlwind romance, newlywed Karen leaves everything behind to start a dream life on the water with husband David. But the dream soon turns into a nightmare when David's true colors emerge. And trapped on the sea, there's nowhere to run.

programme.title: Disappeared: California Leaving
programme.desc: Former Harlem Globetrotter Rico Harris is driving from LA to Seattle and mysteriously vanishes. When his car is found abandoned in a remote area, investigators and his loved ones embark on a journey that grows more baffling as time passes.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Love and Death
programme.desc: Atlanta pre-school teacher Julie Love goes missing just a week after getting engaged to her boyfriend Mark. Detectives uncover numerous suspects, but the evil truth is worse than they ever could have imagined...

programme.title: Dead of Winter: Last Christmas
programme.desc: Weeks after the Christmas disappearance of 22-year-old Dean Fawcett, detectives discover a headless body in the snow. A handwritten note points to a dangerous set of suspects, setting investigators on a cross-country manhunt to unravel the truth.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Frozen in Fear
programme.desc: A pedestrian check turns deadly when a cop is gunned down on a midnight patrol. The attacker flees with the officer's squad car...and her weapon. The stakes are higher than ever as investigators try to capture the person who killed one of their own.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: A Mystery in the Pines
programme.desc: Caught in a love triangle, young chef and mom Heather Mallory vanishes. Now Portland detectives and Heather's parents search for the truth in an investigation involving wiretaps, confidential informants and a dramatic resolution deep in the forest.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: After blocking the Germans right outside of Moscow, Stalin now faces Hitler's second assault. The world's fate will be decided in Stalingrad. Like in Leningrad, men, women, and children are plunged into hell and sacrificed.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: The Soviets continue on the path to towards liberation. On the road to Berlin, they discover the horror of Hitler's extermination camps. Fifteen years earlier, Stalin transformed his country using every means at his disposal.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Baghdad: Thunder Runs
programme.desc: In what would become one of the most brutal and decisive battles of the Iraq war, a battalion of tanks punches a hole right into the heart of Saddam Hussein's Baghdad in 2003. They are the first Mechanised force to enter a capitol city since WWII.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Fallujah: The Taking of Terror Central

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Midway: Taking Back the Pacific

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Chosin: One Way Out
programme.desc: Trapped and outnumbered seven to one early in the Korean War, US Marines must fight their way out or die.

programme.desc: Six thousand outnumbered marines fight for survival against a vast, highly trained Communist army in a bloody 77 day siege. It's a battle that will shape the course of the war in Vietnam.

programme.desc: 36 U.S Special Forces face a Taliban insurgence 5 times their size. Facing I.E.Ds , RPG's and vicious counter attacks, they fight for their lives to take the hill of Sperwan Ghar, as control of the hill is control of Kandahar.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Fallujah: The Taking of Terror Central
programme.desc: Operation Phantom Fury was meant to be a 48 hour battle but insurgents, armed with IEDs and a stockpile of grenades, fought back. US forces faced one of the toughest urban conflicts since Vietnam as they tried to reclaim the city.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Baghdad: Thunder Runs
programme.desc: In what would become one of the most brutal and decisive battles of the Iraq war, a battalion of tanks punches a hole right into the heart of Saddam Hussein's Baghdad in 2003. They are the first Mechanised force to enter a capitol city since WWII.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Midway: Taking Back the Pacific
programme.desc: June 1942, six months after Pearl Harbour, the battle of Midway will change the course of history and the Pacific war. The Americans take on the most powerful navy in the world, and win.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Chosin: One Way Out
programme.desc: Trapped and outnumbered seven to one early in the Korean War, US Marines must fight their way out or die.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Khe Sanh: Marines Under Siege
programme.desc: Six thousand outnumbered marines fight for survival against a vast, highly trained Communist army in a bloody 77 day siege. It's a battle that will shape the course of the war in Vietnam.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Hue: Vietnam's Bloodiest Battle
programme.desc: In a final showdown marines must breech the heavily fortified walls of the ancient citadel where thousands of NVA soldiers lie in wait. After one of the bloodiest battles of the entire Vietnam War, the marines are finally victorious.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Nazification
programme.desc: A look at how Hitler implemented changes through anti-Semitic clothing laws, the establishing of SS bride schools and breeding programmes that saw children stolen from their parents.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Hitler's British Headquarters
programme.desc: In this episode, Guy looks at the Nazi plans for Britain. From pre-war spying, concentration camps on British soil, to national landmarks earmarked by Hitler for his own use.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Transporting the Reich
programme.desc: At look at how Hitler's redesign of the German transport system was a key factor in his preparations for war, including how he used the car industry for the rearmament of his military and see his plans for a colossal rail system.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: America
programme.desc: In this episode we'll uncover support for the National Socialist movement within America, revealing outposts of Nazi Germany within the land of the free. We'll also learn about the man thought he believed he was the American Fuhrer.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Mountain Massacre
programme.desc: The Black Devils, a joint American-Canadian mountain warfare unit, are about to go into action. They must mount a do-or-die night-time assault up a treacherous mountain, in extreme weather, to take on heavily-entrenched battle hardened German defenses.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Fighting Fox: Road to Hell
programme.desc: The paratroopers of Fighting Fox Company, 2nd Battalion, 506th Parachute Infantry Regiment fought and died from Normandy to Hitler's Eagle's Nest. Their sheer determination against the enemy was matched only by their devotion to one another.

programme.desc: A couple purchased a quaint cabin with an accompanying railroad caboose. The team transform both spaces to create a camp by enlarging the main cabin with more sleeping space and indoor plumbing while the caboose provides more storage and bunk space.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Clearwater Camp

programme.desc: Candice and Brian are moving from Denver, Colo. to Cocoa Beach, Fla., and have enlisted broker Andy Barclay to help them find a home on the water with a pool and a large outdoor space for their two daughters.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Supersizing in St. Petersburg, Florida

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Crystal Beach, Here We Come!

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Not-So-Pleasant Camp On Pleasant Pond
programme.desc: Chase and his team are called in to renovate a neglected camp for a growing family. Right away, the unusual footprint proves troublesome when trying to create a second bedroom inside.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Camp on Two Ponds
programme.desc: Chase and his team of Maine builders have been called in to renovate a camp uniquely located on two ponds. With winter right around the corner, Chase knows they need to hustle in order to complete the renovation.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Veterans' Retreat
programme.desc: A man is building a retreat to help combat-injured veterans and their families adjust to their new normal. The team are tasked with turning a cottage into an ADA-compliant event center. The key feature will be a deck that can accommodate up to 40.

programme.title: Good Eats: Rich Little Poor Boy
programme.desc: One of America's most storied sandwiches gets a historic rethink and a technical do-over, from the oysters to the bread and everything in between. Alton Brown also makes an argument for shucking.

programme.title: Good Eats: My Shakshuka
programme.desc: Alton Brown takes a deep dive on one of the most internet-famous dishes of the decade by way of a famous film from the 1940s. Along the way, Alton talks through preserved lemons and homemade harissa.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Pressure: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown reloads his original pressure cooker episode with a brand-new broth and his take on the Vietnamese classic, pho.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Steak Your Claim
programme.desc: Alton Brown 'reloads' his classic steak show with an entirely new recipe for a reverse-seared ribeye steak. He also reviews thermometer basics, how to cure a cast-iron skillet and why pre-salting meat can be the right thing to do.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Endless Pasta-bilities

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Sandwich Hall Of Fame
programme.desc: We're honoring the all-time favorite sandwiches in the 'Sandwich Hall of Fame,' because it's all about the bread and what's in between! If you've never had a BL'G'T, Eddie Jackson will tell you where to go.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Serious Spice
programme.desc: Good food is the spice of life, and we're adding a little kick with our flavor-filled favourites.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Hamburger Heaven
programme.desc: It's burger time, and your favourite food personalities are pointing you in the right direction.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Small Plates, Big Taste

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: San Diego
programme.desc: From wild vegetables to wild animals, Andrew gets a taste of the unexpected when he visits San Diego.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: The Other Florida
programme.desc: Get away from Florida's big cities and beaches to delve into the interior part of the state where the people and the food have an identity all of their own.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Iowa State Fair
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern shares a tour of the Iowa State Fair, one of the largest and best known state fairs in the U.S. A gastronomic trip through the 445-acre fairgrounds reveals fresh, locally grown sweet corn, baked sausage cavatelli and Dutch letter pastries.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Bermuda
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the landscape and cuisine of the island of Bermuda, a 21-square-mile British territory with Caribbean soul.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Bangkok: A Second Bite
programme.desc: Bangkok, Thailand, has so many culinary treasures, it deserves a second trip! From steamed whole bass to massaman curry, Andrew highlights the city's exotic flavors and meals that are meant to be shared.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Trinidad And Tobago
programme.desc: Andrew samples the island flavors and culinary mashups of Trinidad and Tobago. These islands have a passion for food and life, featuring dishes like curried crab with dumplings, crispy fried shark sandwiches and soft and silky flatbreads.

programme.desc: The Midnight Society gathers around the campfire to tell each other spooky tales.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Super Charge: Return of the Caveman
programme.desc: Chase tries to help Koda adapt to modern-day technology after he struggles to learn how to ride their new high-tech Dino Cycles. But when they are caged by one of Sledge's monsters, Koda must rely on his caveman instincts to escape and save his friend.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patchy's Playlist
programme.desc: Patchy takes a fun-filled journey through the world of SpongeBob's best musical moments.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patnocchio/ ChefBob
programme.desc: Plankton tells Patrick he's his conscience so he can convince him to steal him a Krabby Patty. SpongeBob gets stage fright and has to invent a new persona.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Plankton Paranoia/ Library Cards
programme.desc: Plankton hasn't tried to steal the secret formula in a while and that's making Mr. Krabs nervous. SpongeBob introduces Patrick to the wonderful world of book learning.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Call the Cops/ Surf N' Turf
programme.desc: Plankton goes to jail, but the secret formula is taken as evidence so SpongeBob and Mr. Krabs plot to get it back. Sandy struggles to build a ship-in-a-bottle before a big contest, so SpongeBob calls in a little extra help.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpaceBob MerryPants
programme.desc: Sandy takes her 'Science Scout' troop on a trip to the moon.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Appointment TV/ Karen's Virus
programme.desc: The long-lost episode of Mermaid Man is finally showing on TV, but SpongeBob may not make it home in time to watch. Karen gets a computer virus, and it's up to SpongeBob to get it out of her.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Grill Is Gone/ the Night Patty
programme.desc: When a gang of kids steals the Krusty Krab's grill, SpongeBob and Mr. Krabs go to extreme lengths to win it back. SpongeBob helps out the Krusty Krab's night shift crew, but the customers crave something creepier than usual.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Bubbletown/Girls’ Night Out
programme.desc: SpongeBob visits his old pal Bubble Buddy's hometown Bubbletown. Sandy invites Karen and Mrs. Puff out for a night on the town, so the ladies decide to blow off some steam.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Squirrel Jelly/The String
programme.desc: SpongeBob pulls a string that never seems to end from Squidward's shit.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: FarmerBob/ Gary and Spot
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick work on Old Man Jenkins' farm. And, Sandy narrates the adventures of Gary and Spot.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Nitwitting/ The Ballad of Filthy Muck
programme.desc: Patrick introduces SpongeBob to his society of dullards and doofuses. /Patrick takes his grime to a new level, playing around in the trash so much that he's unrecognizable.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Krusty Slammer/ Pineapple RV
programme.desc: When Plankton breaks the law, Mr. Krabs turns the Krusty Krab into a jailhouse.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Gary's Got Legs/ King Plankton
programme.desc: Gary gets a set of legs to keep up with SpongeBob, but makes his owner look sluggish by comparison. And, Plankton practices ruling the world by shrinking himself and declaring himself king od SpongeBob's aquarium.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Plankton's Old Chum
programme.desc: Where Plankton usually dumps his rotten chum is too full, so he tricks SpongeBob into hiding it around the city.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Swamp Mates/ One Trick Sponge
programme.desc: Bubble Bass gets stranded with Patrick in a swamp looking for a lost action figure.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Krusty Bucket/Squid's on a Bus
programme.desc: Plankton clones himself and Mr. Krabs, and Squidward switches jobs with a school bus driver, but SpongeBob and Patrick climb aboard.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sandy's Nutty Nieces/ Insecurity Guards
programme.desc: SpongeBob gets in over his head when he volunteers to babysit Sandy's three nieces. SpongeBob and Patrick volunteer as guards at the museum, while Squidward attempts to hang his painting unnoticed.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Broken Alarm/ Karen's Baby
programme.desc: SpongeBob breaks his alarm clock and nothing else is loud enough to wake him up. And, Karen learns that kids grow up too fast after her new child arrives in the mail.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Shell Games/ Senior Discount
programme.desc: When Old Man Jenkins disrupts business at the Krusty Krab, Mr. Krabs cant find a way to kick him out.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mind the Gap/ Dirty Bubble Returns
programme.desc: SpongeBob has a change in demeanor after Squidward closes the gap in his teeth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Enemy of My Enemy
programme.desc: After witnessing the Kraang in action, Karai comes to realize the seriousness of an alien threat and approaches the Turtles to propose an alliance.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Karai's Vendetta
programme.desc: While the Turtles are infiltrating an undersea Kraang base, the Foot Clan attempts to capture April, forcing her to fend for herself in a battle of wits against Karai.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Pulverizer Returns
programme.desc: When Shredder schemes to create a fearsome army of mutants, the Turtles have no choice but to rely on the help of the newest recruit to the Foot Clan: The Pulverizer!

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Parasitica
programme.desc: Michelangelo must save his brothers after they fall under the control of a parasitic wasp.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Operation: Break Out
programme.desc: Donatello breaks into a secret Kraang detention center in order to rescue Kirby O'Neil. But when he discovers they are trapped inside with a deadly mutant prisoner, he realizes that breaking in was the easy part.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Showdown
programme.desc: As the Turtles make a desperate assault on TCRI to shut down an alien portal, they find themselves engaging in the most difficult battle yet.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Showdown
programme.desc: As the Turtles make a desperate assault on TCRI to shut down an alien portal, they find themselves engaging in the most difficult battle yet.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Mutation Situation
programme.desc: When Shredder teams with the Kraang to receive a batch of mutagen, the Turtles' problems only get worse - even putting their friendship with April at stake.

programme.title: Danger Force: Cat
programme.desc: Captain Man and Schwoz have a new group of four young superheroes to train.

programme.title: Side Hustle: Yard Sale
programme.desc: Needing money for this week's payment, the kids throw a yard sale. It's a success, but a miscommunication causes the toy that Lex stores their KidDING! money in to be sold. The kids have to find the buyer before Tedward comes to collect his payment.

programme.title: The Substitute: The Bella Twins
programme.desc: WWE Superstar Nikki Bella turns into three quirky characters: a dog trainer-turned-gym teacher, a Bridesmaidzilla, and a clown doubling as a career counselor. Her sister Brie Bella plays puppet master as Nikki goes undercover as The Substitute.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: The Sushi Sitter/ Cheer Beast
programme.desc: Captain Man must save Kid Danger from Drillfinger with the only tool he has: a motorized toilet.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: Snooze Pods/ Sticky Vicky
programme.desc: Jasper becomes trapped in a dream using one of Schwoz's Snooze Pods. Henry's field trip to the Museum of Celebrity Garbage is cut short by the arrival of Sticky Vicky.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Too Much Game
programme.desc: When a new student takes Henry's place on the basketball team, Henry thinks he is older than he says he is. Captain Man must overcome past grudges when he needs the help of an old friend.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Henry the Man-Beast
programme.desc: Henry's got a big date, but things don't go quite as planned after he's accidentally exposed to a strange device in the Man Cave.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Invisible Brad
programme.desc: Captain Man's friend Brad, who years ago was accidentally turned invisible, shows up to visit but quickly overstays his welcome.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Spoiler Alert
programme.desc: Henry and Ray have to deal with an especially annoying new villain, the Spoiler. Piper is pushed to her limits as she tries to join a popular Captain Man fan club.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Let's Make a Steal
programme.desc: Captain Man gets Henry a spot on his favourite game show, Spin and Win, in an attempt to investigate a string of robberies - but Henry soon finds himself a victim of one such robbery.

programme.title: Henry Danger: My Phony Valentine
programme.desc: When Henry's crush goes on a Valentine's date with someone else, Schoz provides an android to make her jealous. Ray has an unpleasant date with one of Henry's teachers.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Weirdmageddon
programme.desc: Trapped in the apocalypse and menaced by villains new and old, Dipper finds himself in a race against time.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Mom Attractor/ Cranius Maximus
programme.desc: Candice asks the boys to invent a device that attracts their mom so that she can bust her brothers. In the meantime, Dr. Doofenshmirtz invents a 'Baby-Cry-Inator.' The boys invent a cerebral stimulatory hat to help Baljeet.

programme.title: The Owl House: Sense and Insensitivity
programme.desc: When King becomes a bestselling author, he learns a valuable lesson in reading the fine print.

programme.title: Amphibia: Family Fishing Trip/ Bizarre Bazaar
programme.desc: Sprig wants to spend time with Hop Pop on their family fishing trip, but Hop Pop's friend Sylvia gets in the way. Anne's music box goes missing at the mysterious and exclusive Bizarre Bazaar.

programme.title: Amphibia: Scavenger Hunt/ The Plantars Check In
programme.desc: Anne, Sprig and Marcy receive a mysterious message from the king of Newtopia that sends them on a puzzle-solving mission. Anne finally meets with King Andrias and tries to enlist his help in getting back home.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Fight for Castle McDuck!
programme.desc: A bitter feud between Scrooge and his sister spreads to the rest of the family as Phantom Blot attempts to steal a priceless artifact and destroy Castle McDuck once and for all.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Mini-Maximum Trouble
programme.desc: When Fred runs into a string of bad luck, Megan reveals to Hiro that she's trying to uncover the true identities of Big Hero 6 for her school's newspaper.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Little Gift Shop of Horrors
programme.desc: In three separate mysterious tales, Stan is cursed by a witch, Waddles accidentally eats a bowl of brain-enhancing jelly and builds a machine that allows him to speak for the first time and Mabel faces her fear of Claymotion.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cursed!/ Fiddle Me This
programme.desc: After Anne helps Sprig break up with Maddie, strange things start happening to them. When a popular talent competition comes to Wartwood, Hop Pop goes overboard in training Sprig to win.

programme.title: Amphibia: Quarreler's Pass/ Toadcatcher
programme.desc: Hop Pop drops Sprig and Polly off at an obstacle-filled mountain trail designed to help them get along. Sasha and Grime must reconcile their differences to escape Newtopia's most skilled warrior, General Yunnan.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Klimpaloon Ultimatum
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb must help Love Handel prove the existence of Klimpaloon, or else Love Handel will be barred from the world of fact-based song writing for all time.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: My Fair Goalie
programme.desc: When Ferb's cousins visit from England and challenge him to a soccer match, he and Phineas warp the walls of physics and build a high tech 3D stadium. Candace enlists the help of Eliza to teach her the rules of etiquette.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Blendin's Game
programme.desc: Blendin Blandin returns to face off with Dipper and Mabel in a futuristic battle that could trap them forever in time jail.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Stanchurian Candidate
programme.desc: When Grunkle Stan decides to run for mayor, Dipper and Mabel have their work cut out for them trying to turn their gaffe-prone uncle into the perfect candidate.

programme.title: The Owl House: Lost in Language
programme.desc: Luz's pranks at the library lead to unintended consequences.

programme.title: The Owl House: Witches Before Wizards
programme.desc: Luz receives a map for a mystical quest from an ancient wizard.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cane Crazy / Flood, Sweat & Tears
programme.desc: When Anne breaks Hop Pop's favorite cane, she and her friends set out to replace it; After Anne's bedroom floods she has to share a room with Sprig.

programme.title: Amphibia: Dating Season / Anne vs. Wild
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Something Fluffy
programme.desc: When mysterious but adorable creatures called Mayoi suddenly appear in San Fransokyo, Hiro is convinced that they’re part of some nefarious plot by Liv Amara.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Write Turn Here
programme.desc: Hiro is forced to write a story for his class and decides to write a Big Hero 6 story. Meanwhile, strange versions of Noodle Burger Boy attack the team.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Spark of Rebellion, Part One
programme.desc: Ezra inadvertently messes up one of Kanan's missions and is forced to escape with the crew of the Ghost in order to survive. The boys find out Kanan and his team are freedom fighters, and their next assignment is freeing Wookie prisoners.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Spark of Rebellion, Part Two
programme.desc: During his attempt to save the team from the Imperial trap, Ezra is captured by Agent Kallus. The rebels rescue the kid and set off on their original mission: to liberate the Wookiees destined for a terrible fate.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Fighter Flight
programme.desc: Hera sends Ezra and Zeb into the city on a simple errand, but in a foolhardy stunt, the boys steal a TIE fighter instead. They wind up using the captured ship to free innocent prisoners en route to a labor camp.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Breaking Ranks
programme.desc: Ezra infiltrates Lothal's Academy for Young Imperials, where the Empire identifies Force-sensitive children and indoctrinates the youths of Lothal into joining their ranks. With the help of cadet Zare Leonis, he gets vital information for the rebels.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Gathering Forces
programme.desc: To draw the Imperials away from Tseebo, Kanan lures the Inquisitor to a planet filled with dangerous creatures. In the heat of battle, Ezra taps into his growing abilities with the Force allowing the Phantom to flee.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Path of the Jedi
programme.desc: Ezra must face a great challenge as part of his growth as a member of the team.

programme.title: Guardians of the Galaxy: Mission Breakout: Black Vortex: Part One
programme.desc: The Guardians, desperate to escape The Collector's ship, jump into the Black Vortex mirror. They get separated in the Black Vortex and find themselves in a different world.

programme.title: Guardians of the Galaxy: Mission Breakout: Black Vortex: Part Two
programme.desc: The Guardians continue to battle their way through the Black Vortex. Rocket searches for his best friend Groot, and Groot reaches the nightmarish heart of the Black Vortex.

programme.title: Guardians of the Galaxy: Mission Breakout: Black Vortex: Part Three
programme.desc: Quill must escape the Milano as it hurtles towards the sun. Meanwhile Rocket and Drax find themselves in cartoony peril as they search to save Groot from the Black Vortex.

programme.title: Guardians of the Galaxy: Mission Breakout: Black Vortex: Part Four
programme.desc: Gamora and Quill battle through an 8-bit world and finally reunite with the other Guardians in the center of the Black Vortex.

programme.title: Beyblade: Burst Surge: The Blading Revolution!
Beyblade: Burst Surge: Locked On! Lightning Launch!

programme.desc: After an all night science-fiction movie marathon, Candace is convinced that Ferb is an alien and gathers evidence to prove it. The boys admit that they are doing something for an alien but that Ferb is not one.

programme.title: DuckTales: New Gods on the Block!
programme.desc: The kids try to prove themselves by auditioning to take Zeus’ place amongst the Greek gods, while Storkules interferes with Donald and Daisy’s date.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Cobra and Mongoose / Better Off Fred
programme.desc: Fred is attacked by mechanical cobras, however their target is a former spy codename: Mongoose! Fred meets the girls of his dreams, only to be rejected by her.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Hand That Rocks the Mabel

programme.desc: Three years after beating Apollo Creed, with whom he has become great friends, Balboa loses his title to Clubber Lang, who inadvertently causes the death of Mickey. Apollo helps Rocky train for a rematch against Lang so he can win the title back.

programme.title: Movie: Rocky IV
programme.desc: When Rocky's old friend Apollo Creed is killed during a fight with a super-fit Russian boxer, Ivan Drago, Rocky blames himself. Rocky arranges to fight Ivan in Russia.

programme.title: Movie: Rocky V
programme.desc: Suddenly bankrupt and forced into retirement by debilitating boxing injuries, Rocky Balboa returns to his Philadelphia roots and decides to coach a young and talented but arrogant protege.

programme.title: Movie: Rocky Balboa
programme.desc: A retired boxer, known as one of the greatest, is inspired to step back into the boxing ring.

programme.title: Movie: City Island
programme.desc: The lives of a family are disturbed when an ex-con is brought home by one of the family members who is a corrections officer.

programme.title: Movie: Genius

programme.title: Movie: Too Fast Too Furious
programme.desc: An officer, stripped of his badge, is recruited to infiltrate an illegal Miami street racing circuit in an effort to redeem himself.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Don't Hassle the Hoff/ Pontiac Trans Am, Part II
programme.desc: It's a race against time as the Monkeys rush to finish the KITT car. Richard's on edge because he's worried that he and Aaron might not make it to the Las Vegas birthday party with the car by the deadline. They also don't know if the Hoff will show up.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Gas Monkey Bandit Car, Part I

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Bullies
programme.desc: Chandler and Ross confront two bullies who have taken over their couch at Central Perk.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Two Parties
programme.desc: Monica organizes Rachel's birthday party and invites Rachel's divorced mother and father.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Chicken Pox
programme.desc: Phoebe catches chicken pox and passes it on to her boyfriend; Joey gets a job.

programme.title: Mom: Nazi Zombies and a Two-Hundred Pound Baby
programme.desc: Bonnie tries to get Christy to admit she still has feelings for her ex-husband, Baxter.

programme.title: Mom: Cornflakes and the Hair of Three Men
programme.desc: When the restaurant closes for renovations, Christy takes a job as Jill's personal assistant. Also, Bonnie answers a wrong number and falls for the guy on the other end of the line.

programme.title: Mom: Caperberries and a Glass Eye
programme.desc: Christy encourages Bonnie to go out with a great new guy, only to find out he's not as great as they thought.

programme.title: Mom: Beast Mode and Old People Kissing
programme.desc: When Jodi's boyfriend, Travis, who was with her when she overdosed, shows up at an A.A. meeting, Christy struggles to show him the compassion he needs. Also, Bonnie's new boyfriend, Adam, feels left out because she spends so much time at A.A.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: A Loaf of Bread and a Grand Old Flag
programme.desc: Things spiral out of control when Sheldon boycotts his favorite bread company. Also, Georgie offers Veronica a shoulder to cry on when she’s dumped by her boyfriend.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: Albert Einstein and the Story of Another Mary
programme.desc: Inspired by his hero, Albert Einstein, Sheldon tries his hand at the violin. Also, Mary and Meemaw secretly buy a pregnancy test when Mary thinks she's pregnant.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: A Perfect Score and a Bunsen Burner Marshmallow
programme.desc: Sheldon moves in with Dr. Sturgis for the weekend to see what his life will be like in college. Also, a lonely Mary tries to bond with the other Coopers during Sheldon’s absence.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: A Political Campaign and a Candy Land Cheater
programme.desc: Unhappy that school funds are going towards football rather than academics, Sheldon decides to run for class president.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: A Proposal and a Popsicle Stick Cross
programme.desc: Georgie is thrilled when Veronica stays at the Coopers’ house for a few days. Also, Meemaw and Dr. Sturgis celebrate their one-year anniversary.

programme.title: Full House: The Seven Month Itch
programme.desc: Jesse's lack of privacy drives him out of the house for a break and he misses a party.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Picture Day/ Pat No Pay/ Blackjack
programme.desc: SpongeBob must attend Picture Day for the Boating School Year Book; Patrick steals.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Bear-ly Save Danny/ Pups Save the Mayor's Tulips
programme.desc: Danny X is stuck in a tree over a deep canyon and is pursued by hungry bears.

programme.title: Peppa Pig: The School Roof Has a Leak/ Fruit/ The Aquarium/ Fish Pond/ Desert Island
programme.desc: The children organize a party to raise money to replace the school's leaky roof. Then, Goldie the goldfish is feeling a little lonely, so Peppa takes her to the aquarium.

programme.title: Peppa Pig: The Outback/ Surfing
programme.desc: Peppa, George, Mummy Pig, and Daddy Pig go to visit the Kangaroo family in Australia and get to explore The Outback.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa is a lovable little piggy who lives with her little brother, Mummy and Daddy Pig.

programme.title: Deer Squad: Meteor Mayhem/ Dance of Destruction
programme.desc: A meteor is heading for earth, and Sir Steel's heroic efforts only make the Deer Squad's job in saving the planet even harder! A dance competition in the Central Forest turns chaotic when Sir Steel uses his monkey suit to beat Rammy in the final.

programme.title: Team Umizoomi: The Kitty Rescue/ Binoo's Birthday
programme.desc: The team navigates their way down a river, across a farm and over a mountain to rescue a kitty stuck inside a well.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Ultimate Rescue: Pups Save the Movie Monster!
programme.desc: Envious Mayor Humdinger tries to draw the Adventure Bay Monster Movie production to Foggy Bottom by commandeering the mechanical movie monster.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Get Skunked/ Pups and a Whale of a Tale
programme.desc: When Everest gets sprayed by a skunk, the pups delicately try to tell her she needs a bath! The pups put a new spin on freeze tag when they fly north to help free a baby whale that's trapped under the ice.

programme.title: Blue's Clues & You: Blue's Show and Tell Surprise
programme.desc: Josh and Blue go to school. Play Blue's Clues to figure out what Blue wants to share at Show and Tell.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines: The Race Around the Earth
programme.desc: In their biggest race ever, Blaze and AJ go head-to-head against Crusher to race all the way around the Earth and win the World's Biggest Trophy.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save a Melon Festival/ Pups Save A Cow
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger’s plan to win the giant melon contest results in chaos all over town; the pups help Farmer Al lower his truck from a broken bridge.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save a Sleepover/ Pups Save the Carnival
programme.desc: Farmer Al's animals go missing during a sleepover. Cornelius has escaped from the pig ride at the carnival, and the prizes have gone missing too.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save a White Wolf/ Pups Save a Wrong Way Explorer
programme.desc: After a sudden snow storm, Everest cares for a white wolf cub as they work together to help the PAW Patrol find them. Famous wrong-way explorer, Travelling Travis, accidentally takes Chickaletta to the North Pole where they run into... crocodiles.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Dino Rescue: Pups and the Lost Dino Eggs
programme.desc: A lost world of Dinosaurs is discovered, Mayor Humdinger wants to take Dino Eggs back to Foggy Bottom.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mermaidman and Barnacle Boy III/ Squirrel Jokes
programme.desc: Mermaidman and Barnacle Boy go away for the weekend; Bob becomes a stand-up comic.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: You Don't Know Sponge/ Tunnel of Glove
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick take a friendship test. Pearl is embarrassed when she must sit next to SpongeBob in the Tunnel of Glove.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patty Caper/ Plankton's Regular

programme.title: Storage Wars: Senior Center Showdown
programme.desc: Darrell lands a locker filled with furniture, and Jarrod gambles on a safe in Homeland, California.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The Old Spanish Standoff
programme.desc: Buyers discover a mannequin phone, a bootlegger's moonshine still, and office equipment in a California town.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Midnight in the Gardena Good and Evil
programme.desc: Two psychics 'see' inside the units at Gardena and have a 'dark' feeling about the place.

programme.title: Storage Wars: School House Lock
programme.desc: In the college town of Fullerton, California the buyers search for textbooks and rare university artifacts.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Gambler's Last Resort
programme.desc: The buyers journey eastward to the city of sin for a marathon of auctions. But with a 300-mile haul between them and their stores, the rules of the game have changed. Now on a level playing field, Jarrod fires back at the big dogs.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Young With the Gun
programme.desc: In Riverside, Jarrod and Barry are greeted by a mob of eager newbies. With their financial futures at stake, the buyers must choose to fight or befriend the crowd. Barry Weiss buys a 'mystery trunk.'

programme.title: Storage Wars: Makings of a Mogul

programme.title: Storage Wars: Chairman of the Hoard

programme.title: Storage Wars: Live and Let Bid

programme.title: Storage Wars: Santa Ana Street Fight

programme.title: Storage Wars: Buyers on the Storm
programme.desc: Darrell bids on a locker with a 27,000-dollar payoff; Dave bids on a unit with a stockpile of antiques.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Pay the Lady
programme.desc: When auctioneer Dan Dotson calls in sick, his wife Laura will have to pull out all the stops to sell these lockers.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Hang 'Em High Desert
programme.desc: The buyers return to the high desert, where one discovers an antique toy.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Unclaimed Baggage
