programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: Philly ticketer Shawn faces off with pizza shop employees who think they're above the law. Detroit booters Rodney and Courtney clash with a man who blames the city for his ticket troubles. An exotic dancer tries to free a car from the Philly impound lot.

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: In Philly, a young man tries to alter his expired registration to free his impounded car.

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: In Philly, an infuriated woman calls the cops on rookie Richie for writing tickets.

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: Denise hears from an angry man who was ticketed while helping his handicapped son.

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: An angry citizen challenges LouAnn over a ticket for blocking an alley.

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: Ponytail clashes with men incensed about tickets received in front of a mosque; a woman is furious at being booted for her deceased husband's tickets.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: A Family Cursed
programme.desc: One family faces two unsolved murders of their loved ones. It takes 13 years for detectives to uncover the one missing clue that can lead them to the killer: the hidden crime scene.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Little Girl Lost
programme.desc: A young girl is kidnapped and killed on her way home from a costume party. Ten years later, a detective's obsessive attention to detail exposing a shocking mistake that kept a suspect on the street for 10 years.

programme.title: Forensic Factor: Lasting Impressions
programme.desc: From the tips of their ears to the soles of their feet, criminals are betrayed by clues.

programme.title: Forensic Factor: The Murder Weapon
programme.desc: Forensic science has developed techniques for tracking and identifying murder weapons.

programme.title: Forensic Factor: Beauty Queen
programme.desc: Karyn Slover was murdered in 1996 by her ex-husband's parents.

programme.title: Forensic Factor: A Deadly Affair
programme.desc: Caretaker Larry Mallory notices something unusual while on his way to work. Lying in the middle of the highway is a leg from a department store dummy. When he gets closer, Mallory sees two crows feeding on it. The leg is not plastic, it is flesh.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Drum and Drummer
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Q and Joe convince shoppers to repeat odd catch phrases, then go mental as psychoanalysts. Plus, tonight's losers perform at a halftime show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Butt of the Joker
programme.desc: The guys pair up in focus group presentations, and tonight's loser tries to cure the public of a nasty habit, but gets people smoking mad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Mime and Punishment
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q put the nasty in namaste when they lead guided meditations. Tonight's big loser gets boxed in with a 24-hour punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Three Men and Your Baby
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr, and Q get snap happy posing as photographers, and all but one of the guys are faced with a punishment that's not child's play.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Silence of the Lame
programme.desc: It's all play and no work when the guys square off in a toy-pitching competition. And tonight's big loser has to quiet down patrons in a food court.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bleach for America
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr play receptionist for the day and then teach parents proper home-schooling techniques. One joker lands the endorsement deal of a lifetime.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: The guys take time to smell the roses, then pair up to double dip at the mall. Tonight's loser battles an undead enemy to save his family.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: The guys get drenched at a water park, and tonight's loser strikes out while jockeying for a ball from Mets pitcher Noah Syndergaard.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Urine Trouble
programme.desc: The guys play receptionists looking for suspicious names. The guys seek marriage advice from strangers after a private eye shares incriminating photos. The big loser goes from pissed off to pissed on in the matter of one punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Toll Booth Corrector
programme.desc: The guys pose as suspicious nutritionists trying to recruit clients, before quitting their jobs for strange reasons. Afterwards, the gang goes head-to-head in a wild debate judged by a stranger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Paternity Test
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr pose as concierges in a hotel lobby, and then commit insurance fraud with the help of some confused strangers. Afterwards, tonight's loser suffers a personal punishment that's anything but child's play.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rock Botton
programme.desc: The guys 'do the farts' with actor Jeff Daniels, and then try to get strangers to take their sides in ridiculous arguments. Later, tonight's loser finds himself up against a wall around a group of college students.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: It's Electric
programme.desc: The guys pitch whimsical TV show idea to focus groups and then go to the park with their 'daughters' who share unpopular opinions. The loser heads to the spa for an electrifying punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sun-Fan Lotion
programme.desc: Murr, Q and Sal are at the massage parlor for much kneaded relaxation, and then ask strangers their opinions on questionable yearbook ads. Later, tonight's big loser has an awkward but fan-tastic time in the sun.

programme.title: Fast Foodies: Amanda Seales
programme.desc: The three chefs aim to recreate Taco Bell's Cheesy Gordita Crunch for Amanda Seales.

programme.title: Fast Foodies: GaTa
programme.desc: GaTa tasks the three chefs with recreating Domino's Hawaiian Pizza.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes and discover who considered taking a quick thumbs down. Plus, find out what type of vacation Murr prefers, and how many attempts it took to film the punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Joker for a Day
programme.desc: Find out which challenges the crew loves the most and what the original name for the TV show started off as. Also, find out how the Jokers pick their victims.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Murr's Farms Episode
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Sal and Joe have a meal made entirely out of produce from Murr's backyard. Plus, Wayne Brady, the greatest improviser of all time, joins the conversation.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Food Ya Never Ate Episode
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Sal and Joe try a dish they've never eaten, and a special guest stops by. Plus, Q drops a world premiere music video for his diabolical new song.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Silly Behaviour
programme.desc: Witness an epic elevator prank, the best game of ping pong since Forrest Gump and a colossal showdown between chameleon and cell phone.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Laugh Riot
programme.desc: Learn how to play the most epic game of mattress dominos ever, and see why staircase sledding never gets old.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: World Wide Whackos
programme.desc: Find out how a little eye makeup can help you pull off a prank that's both hilarious and scary. Plus, watch things go downhill in a hurry when people try to back that thang up.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Pranks and Funny Fails
programme.desc: Find out what happens when you get caught in a no-selfie zone, why mailing humans is the way of the future, and how cuddling is an art form of its own.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Fire in Sex Town

programme.desc: Rob shocks everyone when he takes up chainsaw art in Khloe's backyard. Meanwhile, Kim plans to get back at her judgmental family by secretly feeding them placenta, and Bruce takes some of Jimmy Fallon's jokes a little too personally.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Backdoor Bruiser
programme.desc: Khloe tries to figure out what’s causing her memory issues. Meanwhile, Kris is confused when Kendall starts spending more time with the Jenner side of the family and the kids attempt to embarrass Bruce by recreating his and Kris’s lost sex tape.

programme.title: Movie: The Wedding Singer
programme.desc: After being stood up at the altar, Robby's entire world is turned upside down. Performing for wedding receptions and bar mitzvahs only serves as a constant reminder of his unhappiness, until he meets and falls in love with a waitress named Julia.

programme.title: Movie: The Waterboy
programme.desc: A waterboy becomes a football sensation when a coach discovers his talent.

programme.title: Movie: The Waterboy
programme.desc: A waterboy becomes a football sensation when a coach discovers his talent.

programme.title: Modern Family: Grill, Interrupted
programme.desc: Jay's birthday brings everyone together and Phil is beside himself over the super cool gift he got Jay, a high-tech outdoor grill. Claire and Mitch decide they will 'offer' to pay back the money Jay loaned them ages ago.

programme.title: Modern Family: Knock 'Em Down
programme.desc: Jay agrees to sub in on Cam's bowling team for the finals. Unfortunately Cam was not fully upfront about it being an all gay league, which puts Jay in a precarious position.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Baby Shower Blues
programme.desc: Kourtney and Khloe can’t believe that Kim doesn’t want a baby shower, so they plan one behind her back. Meanwhile, Kris and Kylie plot to get rid of Bruce’s gun and Khloe gets self-conscious about her body.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: More to the Story
programme.desc: Kim pushes Khloe to consider adoption, but Khloe has other things on her mind. Meanwhile, Kris suspects that Scott sold the scooter she gave him and Bruce secretly trains Khloe's dog.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Paparazzi and Papas
programme.desc: With her due date approaching and the paparazzi growing more out-of-control, the family wants Kim to devise a plan for when she goes into labor. Meanwhile, Khloe and Kourtney try to set up their grandma, MJ, on a blind date.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: All Signs Point to North
programme.desc: Kim needs to deliver earlier than planned, Kris prepares the house for her new granddaughter's arrival, Brody gives Bruce advice on a new friendship, and Khloe tries to make peace with what's happening in her life.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Close Encounters of the Kardashian Kind
programme.desc: Khloe distracts herself from troubles at home by using Bruce's camping trip to hunt for aliens. Meanwhile, Kris wants her family's support while launching her new talk show.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Kylie's Sweet 16
programme.desc: Kylie chooses to plan her Sweet 16 without the help of Kris. Meanwhile, Rob has a serious conversation with Khloe about their current situation and Kris is forced to babysit a pig.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Loving and Letting Go
programme.desc: Kris and Bruce have major decisions to make concerning their future together. Meanwhile, Khloe continues to deal with her changing relationship with Lamar.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: How to Deal
programme.desc: Khloé is hurt by an interview which contains negative comments about her and her family. Kris gets Jonathan to sneak away from Kim for a trip to Sonoma. Scott takes up karate to satisfy his couples therapy homework.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: And All That Jazzzzzzz
programme.desc: Khloé doesn’t feel comfortable in her house so Rob invites her to move in with him. Kris gets bitten by the Broadway bug and starts taking singing and dancing lessons and Kourtney sneaks to Las Vegas to catch Scott in a lie.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: A Surprise Engagement Part 1
programme.desc: The family hears about a surprise Kanye is planning for Kim's birthday. Kris goes into panic mode when she learns Kim's house is delayed and Kourtney and Khloé plot revenge on judgmental Kim.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Your go-to for behind-the-scenes scoop, celebrity guests and entertainment conversation.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: A Surprise Engagement Part 2
programme.desc: The family gathers in San Francisco to surprise Kim on her birthday but the real surprise is Kanye proposing to Kim. Meanwhile, Scott heads to New York to spend time with his father and sick mother.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Two Birthdays and a Yard Sale
programme.desc: Kourtney attempts to organize a family yard sale. Kendall prepares for her 18th birthday and makes plans to move out of the house, while Bruce tries to pretend his upcoming birthday is no big deal.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Courage to Change
programme.desc: Khloé must make a choice about her complicated relationship with Lamar. Meanwhile, Kourtney takes Scott on a getaway to a spa in Arizona and Rob receives troubling news about his health.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Let It Go
programme.desc: The family tries to get to the bottom of Kourtney's lack of emotions. Meanwhile, Khloé accepts an offer on her house but doesn’t want to start packing, and Kris goes out of her way to prove to Kim that she's still got it.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Married with Kitchen
programme.desc: Most married couples consider their kids their babies, but these couples also consider their restaurants their babies. Guy Fieri puts their culinary skills -- and relationships -- to the test.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: All-Star Budget
programme.desc: Guy Fieri invites four superstar chefs to duke it out in a budget battle. These culinary celebrities get hit with budget after budget, in battle after battle, testing their skill of making a dollar stretch all competition long.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Delivery: Frozen Fiasco
programme.desc: Guy Fieri brings Flavortown to the competing all-star chefs by sending them two bulky boxes full of frozen food. In both rounds, the three chefs must convert ice-cold ingredients into dishes that the judges deem delicious.

programme.title: Tournament of Champions: Season One: Behind the Battles

programme.title: Tournament of Champions: West Wild Card Play-In

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Poachers Beware

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Fawn Stars
programme.desc: In Liberty County, the death of a deer is investigated. Fawns in Harris County are being illegally kept as pets. Patrol on Somerville Lake leads to multiple citations. A suspicious car is stopped in Red River County.

programme.title: Home Town: The Move of a Lifetime

programme.title: Home Town: Small Budget, Big Style

programme.title: Home Town: Clean Lines, Open Spaces

programme.desc: A long-time local teacher looks for a house where she can entertain her large family. She has an all-in budget and a wish list that includes a large kitchen and family living area to host her big family get-togethers.

programme.title: Alien Highway: UFO Recovery
programme.desc: Chuck receives a map from an informant supposedly leading to a hidden cache of recovered materials from the Roswell incident. He and his team go on the treasure hunt of lifetime to locate what could be the mother lode of all UFO discoveries.

programme.title: Alien Highway: Arizona Anomalies
programme.desc: Chuck and the team head to Sedona, Arizona after a recent UFO sighting in Phoenix. They investigate whether the area's powerful energy vortexes are acting as portals for otherworldly beings.

programme.title: Alien Highway: Legend of the Skinwalker
programme.desc: A recent creature sighting outside the infamous Skinwalker Ranch brings Chuck and the team to Utah to investigate. Evidence both on the ground and in the skies indicates the mysterious shapeshifter might actually be an alien.

programme.title: Alien Highway: UFO Terror
programme.desc: A Missouri man who claims UFOs are stalking him reaches out to Chuck and the team for help. During the intense investigation, they uncover a dark secret which may explain why their client is experiencing so much UFO activity.

programme.title: Alien Highway: SoCal Clusters
programme.desc: An ongoing flap of UFO sightings in and out of the water off the Southern California coastline leads Chuck and the team to investigate the connection between UFOs, the military and the ocean itself.

programme.title: Alien Highway: Escape From Area 51
programme.desc: After an informant relays a story of an alien that reportedly escaped from Area 51, Chuck and the team head to Tonapah, Nevada, to investigate whether this creature still roams the area.

programme.title: Alien Highway: Missouri Mayhem
programme.desc: A rash of recent UFO sightings brings Chuck's team to Missouri, the home of the 1973 Piedmont lights incident. Armed with new evidence, they question whether history is repeating itself or if the activity never really subsided.

programme.title: Alien Highway: Murder on the Prairie
programme.desc: A series of mysterious animal deaths and UFO sightings brings Chuck to Colorado to search for an explanation for the activity. Reports of the incidents are going unanswered by authorities, leading him to wonder if it's a government cover-up.

programme.title: Married to Medicine: Reunion, Part 1

programme.title: Married to Medicine: Reunion, Part 2

programme.title: Married to Medicine: Reunion, Part 3

programme.title: Below Deck: The One Percenters
programme.desc: Captain Lee, Kate and Nico are joined by six new crew members as they embark on a new charter. Kate and Nico have their hands full as they are charged with training a few inexperienced crew members before the first charter of the season.

programme.title: Below Deck: It Ain't Easy Being Green
programme.desc: Tension is high as Kate and Nico continue to struggle operating with a crew of newbies. The crew welcomes their first charter guests. Mistakes continue to follow the crew and Captain Lee finds himself having to get more involved.

programme.title: Below Deck: Jesus Saves
programme.desc: Chris Brown's decision to nap finds him in the crosshairs with Captain Lee. Kate puts her stews through 101 training in order to get them ready for their next charter. The new guests prove to be a handful.

programme.title: Below Deck: Kate Goes to Church
programme.desc: During their night off Jesus and Kate get to know each other while Chris Brown makes a pass at Brianna. Nico deals with the stress of the boat on the 3-month anniversary of the passing of his brother. Matt makes a move on Brianna.

programme.title: Below Deck: Cool Beans
programme.desc: Captain Lee makes a decision regarding the crew's re-configuration which rocks the team to its core. Matt's date with Brianna has an unexpected outcome when they mistakenly arrive at a nude beach. Jen grows weary with the unfair treatment.

programme.title: Below Deck: 100 Feet From Catastrophe
programme.desc: Nico is pushed to his breaking point under the leadership of boson EJ. Matt continues to unravel after his date with Brianna which causes problems for Kate. Captain Lee makes a staffing decision. Jen feels under-appreciated in her department.

programme.title: Below Deck: Blindsided
programme.desc: Leigh Anne Tuohy, the inspiration for Sandra Bullock's character in the Blindside, and her friends prove to be a challenge for Matt's culinary skills. Nico settles into life as the number two on deck, but questions if he has longevity.

programme.title: Below Deck: Under Cover Boss
programme.desc: Nico and Brianna grow closer despite Nico's girlfriend back in Chicago. Unexpected news sends Matt into an alcohol fueled day off. Baker takes the offensive in her friendship with EJ. Kate challenges Jen and Brianna to a stewardess speed test.

programme.title: Below Deck: Hot Mess Express
programme.desc: Captain Lee, Kate, Nico and Matt have their hands full when eight big personalities from Texas come on board. Matt attempts to step up his cooking game. Bruno decides to help the interior, only to discover how unorganized they are.

programme.title: Below Deck: King Come-On-I-Wanna-Lay-Ya

programme.title: Modern Marvels: Food Trucks
programme.desc: Across much of America, food trucks are changing the way we eat.

programme.title: Modern Marvels: Food: Cookies
programme.desc: Adam Richman sees how Entenmann keeps up with America's demand for chocolate chip cookies. Plus, learn how Otis Spunkmeyer creates cookies found at some of the biggest restaurant chains.

programme.title: Modern Marvels: Food: Cheese
programme.desc: Adam Richman visits a cheese maker in central Pennsylvania that insists on making mozzarella the authentic Italian way. Then, see how grocery giant Kroger slices, shreds and packages over two million pounds of cheese a week.

programme.title: The Food That Built America: The Kings of Burgers
programme.desc: In the 1950s, Ray Kroc franchised McDonalds nationwide, and was followed soon after by two Florida visionaries and their 'flame broiler.' The two iconic restaurants went on to battle it out over burgers.

programme.title: The Food That Built America: American Cheese
programme.desc: At the turn of the 20th century, James Kraft and his new cheese innovation challenged thousands of years of tradition. Around the same time, the Pabst brothers introduced a shelf-stable cheese of their own.

programme.title: The Food That Built America: Cola Wars
programme.desc: In the 1970s, a new era of competition began between two major cola brands, leading to the birth of countless iconic soda products and marketing stunts.

programme.title: Modern Marvels: Food: Ice Cream
programme.desc: Adam Richman visits the Turkey Hill Dairy to see how they make their frosty treats. Plus, get a peek at Dreyer's flavor-development process and find out how Joy Cone bakes over two billion ice cream cones a year.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Plot Thickens
programme.desc: It’s a true Hollywood whodunit. A show business stuntman was shot four times and left to die. Investigators uncovered a love story gone wrong and a villain with a dark secret. But the most stunning twist of all is what didn’t happen.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Black Friday
programme.desc: Ashlea Harris had no shortage of admirers. So when she was found dead after a suspicious fire consumed her apartment, police were baffled.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Under a Full Moon
programme.desc: A Las Vegas cocktail waitress and loving mother is murdered in her home, leading authorities to wonder if there was a predator at large. When detectives find the killer, it is clear that their investigation is just getting started.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Devil's Bathtub
programme.desc: Craig and Laura Rideout appeared happy but, after a contentious separation revealed an ugly secret, one of them would soon be dead. Clues pointed to four possible killers and left investigators wondering if this murder was all in the family.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Circumstances
programme.desc: It was an unthinkable crime. Brittany Eldridge was nearly nine months pregnant when she was found dead in her apartment. Investigators focused on two men believing both had a possible motive but were they capable of murder.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: A Crack in Everything
programme.desc: For many, the holiday season is filled with joy but, for the Jennings family, the night before Christmas became a waking nightmare. A gunshot rang out and investigators had to unravel whether a secret lead to a tragic suicide or if this was murder.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Desire
programme.desc: They were two beautiful families living out their dreams, but gunshots in a parking lot revealed an ugly truth. Investigators uncovered three lives tangled in a love triangle. There were many secrets, but which one was the key to solving the mystery?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Broken Bonds
programme.desc: A quiet night was shattered when intruders terrorized a Florida couple and their young son, killing one of them. Investigators questioned the initial story. Then, a tip led them to another family with dark secrets, and that's when bonds were tested.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets in Seattle
programme.desc: When a 32 year old Seattle woman goes missing, her friends and family are desperate to find her.

programme.title: Dateline: Down the Back Staircase
programme.desc: Back then, he was preppy, witty welcome at so many of the best dinner tables. But nowadays Michael Peterson is known as that man, the notorious husband, the one with the wife dead at the bottom of the staircase.

programme.title: Dateline: Down the Back Staircase
programme.desc: Back then, he was preppy, witty welcome at so many of the best dinner tables. But nowadays Michael Peterson is known as that man, the notorious husband, the one with the wife dead at the bottom of the staircase.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Good Husband
programme.desc: A forty-year-old man was found dead in his car. Initially, there was no obvious medical explanation for Tom's death but when police uncovered a love triangle, this tragedy quickly turned into a tangled mystery.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: In Cold Blood
programme.desc: He was a firefighter used to rescuing others. Now he was the one in desperate need of help. He found his wife bloodied and motionless on the bedroom floor. Could he save her in time? It was a chilling crime with no shortage of potential suspects.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Collision
programme.desc: A wife and a mistress vying for the same man, end up in a high-speed showdown on a highway. The man of their dreams, on his motorcycle nearby, was struck and killed. His wife arrested for his murder.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Silhouette
programme.desc: Real-life mysteries. Investigative reporting. Justice.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Death in the Driveway

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Twisted in Texas
programme.desc: Meghan Verikas had been attracted to Leon Jacob, in part, because as a doctor he saved lives. Now police officers were telling her he was trying to hire a hitman, potentially to take hers. But authorities had a plan of their own.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: A Deadly Path

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Factory of Death

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Thing on Hell Mountain

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Arctic Hell Pit
programme.desc: Traces of a Russian hole to hell in the Arctic, a military base in America's Wild West, and a strange looming tower are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.desc: On a desolate island near Greece, abandoned buildings are evidence of a group of people that were forbidden to leave. Experts reveal who was forced to stay here and if there was a cover-up to conceal what really happened at this strange place.

programme.desc: A gruesome archaeological discovery leads to a shocking excavation that uncovers ancient human carnage on a scale that's unparalleled; experts use 3-D bone modeling to reveal evidence of what may be the first catastrophic, major war in human history.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Viking Stone: Expedition Viking
programme.desc: Hollywood actor Peter Stormare and Elroy Balgaard travel to the East Coast to see stone engravings that could provide further answers and evidence. They also meet with a historian who takes them on a boat trip to follow in the footsteps of the Vikings.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Ghost of Black Mountain
programme.desc: Ghostly remnants of a beautifully constructed town in the remote backwoods of Kentucky suggests a forgotten tale of utter catastrophe and devastation; experts investigate and uncover the dark and oppressive history of a deadly industrial mining complex.

programme.desc: When a river of blood washes through a city's streets, some witnesses believe it's a warning of doomsday. A strange perfect circle emerges in the clouds about California, and some experts speculate that it's evidence of alien activity.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Man Who Laid an Egg
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a man who appears to lay an egg, some experts wonder if it's evidence that scientists created a human-reptile mutant through gene manipulation. Using cutting-edge tech, investigators put this horrifying theory to the test.

programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a strange, human-sized egg floating in Arctic waters, some experts wonder if it's evidence of alien life; using cutting-edge technology, investigators try to reveal the true origins of this unexplained discovery.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Underwater Godzilla
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a massive, never-before-seen sea creature in mysterious waters near Japan, some experts wonder if it's an undiscovered underwater monster; using cutting-edge tech, investigators hunt for this beast of the deep.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Doomsday Volcano NYC
programme.desc: A massive plume of smoke suddenly erupts from the ground in Manhattan, and experts investigate if this terrifying event is evidence of a volcano waking up beneath the streets of New York City and if it's almost due to blow.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Blood for the Snake God
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the bloody origin of the feathered snake god, and experts investigate why the ancient Mesoamericans believed that human sacrifice was the only way to appease the deadly monster.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Curse of the Vampire
programme.desc: Terrifying new discoveries reveal the bloody truth behind the legends of vampires, and experts investigate why people believed these monsters had a taste for human blood.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Demons of the Devil
programme.desc: The latest science reveals that demons aren't just the stuff of horror stories, and as experts investigate shocking new archaeological evidence, they uncover the gruesome methods used to exorcise humans of demonic possessions.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Hunting the Loch Ness Monster
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the truth behind the Loch Ness Monster, and experts investigate the world's most mysterious waters in search of evidence that a prehistoric monster could still be lurking in the deep.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Dark Secrets of the Sphinx
programme.desc: New discoveries uncover the dark secrets of Egypt's strange half-man, half-lion beast, revealing why the pharaohs were so intent on transforming into this powerful and ferocious monster.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Wrath of the Minotaur
programme.desc: A new excavation at the mysterious home of the Minoans leads to a startling discovery about real-life origins of the Minotaur, and experts decode artifacts that point to bloody human sacrifices for the ferocious monster.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: The Kraken Awakens
programme.desc: New discoveries suggest that a sea beast like the Kraken could have existed, and experts examine a strange monster that could give shocking answers into this underwater mystery.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Cradle to the Grave
programme.desc: When a frantic 9-1-1 call reports an infant stopped breathing, Kenda and Walker must see if the daycare is to blame or the parents themselves. Then, Kenda works an execution-style shooting and is shocked to learn the victim is a kindly grandmother.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: Check List
programme.desc: In 1991, a woman is found murdered inside a Nashville motel room. The investigation escalates after Detective Postiglione discovers a similar crime scene in Cincinnati, sending him on a year-long odyssey to capture a serial killer.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Three Miles on Castle Rock Road
programme.desc: After a young Native American woman is found brutalized and clinging to life on the side of a rural Montana road, her family and authorities seek answers. Their search for justice leads them down a shocking, sickening, and devastating road.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death: The Path
programme.desc: In 1997, in quaint Anne Arundel County, Maryland, a detective inherits a stack of cold cases. As he begins to unravel each one, he uncovers a shocking and gruesome common thread.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Beautiful Mess
programme.desc: When twentysomething Patricia Richmond is found tied up, and murdered in her future in-laws' home, the resort town of Steamboat Springs, Colorado is at a loss.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Judith Made Me Do It
programme.desc: When Corey Breininger was a child, his stepmother, Judith Hawkey, coerced him into doing something horrible. In an extended interview, he explores keeping her deadly secret for years, tormented by guilt and wondering how to tell the truth and survive.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Prom Night Killer
programme.desc: Jessi Toronjo went to a sleepover in 1989 thinking her stepbrother, Jeffrey Pelley, was at his senior prom. She spent the next 13 years believing someone else committed the unspeakable crime of that weekend, only to discover she knew the killer all along.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Judith Made Me Do It
programme.desc: When Corey Breininger was a child, his stepmother, Judith Hawkey, coerced him into doing something horrible. In an extended interview, he explores keeping her deadly secret for years, tormented by guilt and wondering how to tell the truth and survive.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Beautiful Mess
programme.desc: When twentysomething Patricia Richmond is found tied up, and murdered in her future in-laws' home, the resort town of Steamboat Springs, Colorado is at a loss.

programme.title: Home Alone: The Doorbell Rang Twice
programme.desc: Newlyweds Kristi and Jim Newman have their Christian beliefs tested to the limit when they come face to face with three masked men in their home. The intruders aren't just here to rob them, they're here to break their souls.

programme.title: Home Alone: Silent Night, Holy Terror
programme.desc: In Alabama in 2010, sassy teenager Haley craves her independence, but her protective mom, Teresa, worries about the company she's keeping. Teresa convinces Haley to end her toxic relationship, but he won't let go until he gets what he wants.

programme.title: The Face of Evil: Jaws of Death
programme.desc: When a New Jersey mother is raped and murdered in the night, her sadistic killer leaves no trace of his identity behind. Months later, a violent attack in another state gives detectives the evidence they need to put the killer away for good.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: The Secrets You Keep
programme.desc: Brittney Cosby and Crystal Jackson are an ambitious couple living in Houston, Texas. When their lifeless bodies are found near a dumpster, authorities comb through the evidence until the shocking identity of their killer is revealed.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: There's No Place Like Home
programme.desc: When a masked man robbing a house is interrupted by the daughter of the house, Sarah Harris, and later her father, the intruder goes to horrible lengths to cover his crimes.

programme.title: Dark Waters: Murder in the Deep: Cursed Paradise
programme.desc: Two couples arrive on the same remote island in the Pacific looking for paradise. Soon, all that either of them finds is trouble. When one couple emerges months later, the FBI will spend years deciphering exactly what happened.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Killer Night Out
programme.desc: Bright and beautiful nurse's aide 19-year-old Janean Brown is found dead in a drainage ditch, her throat cut so deep she is almost decapitated. A riveting investigation will reveal a darker account of the night she died than anyone could have imagined.

programme.title: Dead Silent: The Red River
programme.desc: After Allison Walker mysteriously goes missing just days before Christmas, investigators scour her pig farm in Adairville, Kentucky in search of clues. They quickly discover that the deep, dark secret to her whereabouts lies within her own family.

programme.title: Dead of Winter: Winter's Bone
programme.desc: A pastor discovers a bartender's strangled corpse in the snow, just days before Christmas. Suspicion turns toward the bartender's best friend, but detectives aren't quite sure.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: A Winter's Grave
programme.desc: During an icy Wisconsin winter, a single mom vanishes. Police learn she was recently stalked by two men at a bar, but the danger doesn't stop there. A brutal assault, an anonymous email and a bizarre confession shed light on a deadly encounter.

programme.title: Shadow of Doubt: Murder or Suicide?
programme.desc: A 26-year-old is found shot to death inside her home. The medical examiner declares it a suicide, but a determined investigator takes another look after two different people close to the victim have a very different story to tell.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Who Pulled the Trigger?
programme.desc: They are the victims of shootings that seem senseless, but there is no motive or suspects.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Overlord
programme.desc: By early 1944, Hitler faced a new threat. In the West, Allied preparations to invade northwest France were coming to a climax. It was an attack he had long been expecting. His problem was knowing when and where it would come.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Road to Burma
programme.desc: The Empire of Japan begins to conquer South East Asia. The Allies attempt to block the empire's aggressive expansion, but ruthless tactics by Japan only help to further their war effort.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler: The Menace
programme.desc: See how Hitler succeeded in conquering Germany. Nothing predestines this mediocre student and failed artist to become dictator of Germany the Führer.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: 1929. Germany, harshly affected by the worldwide economic crisis, is sinking into despair. Bloody street fighting between Nazis and Communists is raging. Fear of the 'Red peril' will push millions of voters into Hitler's arms. Democracy is at risk.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Island Warfare
programme.desc: By the summer of 1942, the US has the upper hand in the war with Japan. It has achieved naval superiority. In the spring of 1945 the loss of life is great for both sides but Japan refuses to surrender. US Chiefs desperately look for a way to end the way.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Red Sun Rampant
programme.desc: On December 7th 1941, WWII changed dramatically as Japanese planes swooped in for a surprise attack on the U.S. Pacific Fleet in Pearl Harbour. A conflict that had been fought almost entirely in Europe was now to be fought worldwide.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Victory in Europe
programme.desc: As 1945 began, Hitler's Third Reich was entering its death throes. In the west, Allied forces were within striking distance of the Rhine. In the east, a Red Army blitzkrieg brought Soviet forces to the River Oder just an hour's drive from Berlin.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Hitler's Last Bridge
programme.desc: A brave band of regular GI's are tasked with saving the last bridge and final gateway to the Third Reich. The bridge is bristling with German guns loaded with explosives. Worse, the enemy plan to destroy the bridge if the American unit assaults it.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Red Sun Rampant
programme.desc: On December 7th 1941, WWII changed dramatically as Japanese planes swooped in for a surprise attack on the U.S. Pacific Fleet in Pearl Harbour. A conflict that had been fought almost entirely in Europe was now to be fought worldwide.

programme.desc: See how Hitler succeeded in conquering Germany. Nothing predestines this mediocre student and failed artist to become dictator of Germany the Führer.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: 1929. Germany, harshly affected by the worldwide economic crisis, is sinking into despair. Bloody street fighting between Nazis and Communists is raging. Fear of the 'Red peril' will push millions of voters into Hitler's arms. Democracy is at risk.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Nazi Gold
programme.desc: Stolen gold was the fuel of the Nazi War industry. The team looks into the quantity looted and where it's believed to have ended up. The chilling story of a Canadian Commando and gold taken at Auschwitz is revealed.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Hitler's Obsession
programme.desc: Hitler's desire to acquire the largest art collection in the world led to the theft of numerous rare art treasures throughout Europe. The team delves into how these mass thefts were orchestrated. Also, an astounding discovery is made.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: The Mystery of Rommel's Gold
programme.desc: In 1943, the Nazis looted $50 million in gold from the Jewish community in Djerba, Tunisia. The team tracks the loot to a dive site off Corsica, a pawn shop in Germany, and the family of an escaped Nazi in South America.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Desert War
programme.desc: The war that's encompassed the globe takes root in Africa. An ambitious Mussolini expands the war into North Africa; he sends ill-prepared soldiers, and forces Hitler to come to his ally's aid.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Winston Churchill
programme.desc: May 28, 1940, while the Wehrmacht crushes the allied armies in France, British officials prepare to face Hitler.

programme.title: Air Aces: Wing Walker
programme.desc: The crew of Lancaster ME669 had one of the most dangerous jobs in the Air Force.

programme.title: Air Aces: George Beurling
programme.desc: Canadian George Beurling broke every rule in the book yet became one of the greatest fighter pilots of World War II.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Battle for Sugar Loaf
programme.desc: Taking an otherwise nondescript hill on the embattled island of Okinawa proved to be one of the most incredible battles of WWII. The young weary marines of Charlie Company strained against the searing Pacific sun to see the top of Sugar Loaf Hill.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Final Victory
programme.desc: The provoking thoughts behind some of the war's most tragic events are shared as the war in the Pacific nears its violent end.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: No Surrender

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Heirloom Home on the Shore
programme.desc: After 40 years of use, third-generation owners have decided to add facilities and living quarters to a family camp for large annual family reunions.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Family's Empty Nest
programme.desc: A family has the resources to give their Lincolnville, Maine, cabin the love it deserves now that their four children are almost done with college. However the cabin has been neglected for 25 years and corners were cut in the original build.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Family Gathering Place
programme.desc: Chase and his team take on a project on McGrath Pond in Oakland, ME, that has been empty for 15 years. Stephanie bought this place from her father and promised him she would fix it up.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Stable Family Ties
programme.desc: Chase and the crew have their work cut out for them turning a vacation cabin that was originally a 1920s horse barn into a stable building for a large family. The crew draw on the past as inspiration and want to honour the owners' late parents.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Barnwood Bonanza
programme.desc: The builders score a major salvage from a barn near one of America's oldest pine forests in Brookville, Pennsylvania. Later, Mark and Sherman visit a local mill that turns reclaimed wood into spectacular products.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: Antique barns and cabins are salvaged and the wood reused for stunning modern homes.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Dairy Barn Danger
programme.desc: In Orwigsburg, Pennsylvania, the Barnwood Builders save one of the biggest barns they have ever seen. This dangerous demolition demands the best of everyone.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Sweet Home Louisiana
programme.desc: The guys transform a timber frame barn into a modern home for an architect in Louisiana.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Beechcraft Airplane Salvage
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs try something a little different by bidding on a 1947 Beechcraft airplane. Mike goes a little over budget to win the auction and the crew has to hire professionals to figure out how to disassemble it properly.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Coastal Cottage
programme.desc: Michael finds a 1931 craftsman bungalow that just came on the market which is near the beach and only $65,000.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Fire Salvaged Victorian
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael see hidden potential in a fire-damaged Victorian and decide to save it from demolition. They open up the cramped space by turning a breezeway into a kitchen and repurpose an old safe.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Mystery House
programme.desc: Michael surprises Ashley with an 1893 raised cottage that he purchased before seeing the full interior. The duo soon finds themselves in over their heads when they realize it's not quite the hidden gem Michael thought it was.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: The Weekender
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael aim to help restore Galveston's reputation as America's 'Playground of the South.'

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Run Down Family Rental
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael take on a rundown, family-owned 1939 craftsman. The project is an emotional journey for the duo as the bland home is transformed into a breath-taking abode with room expansions and some inspired flooring choices.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: City Slickers Off the Grid
programme.desc: Chase and his team of builders renovate an off-the-grid camp for a family of city slickers. With limited resources, Chase and his team work to incorporate the comforts of city living into the camp.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin for the Bride
programme.desc: Chase and his team are back home in Augusta getting ready for Lance's wedding. Chase gets a call about a little log cabin stuck in a backyard. He sees the cabin as a fun project for the team to work on and present to Lance's lovely bride.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Six Weeks For Two A-Frames
programme.desc: Chase and his team are called in to renovate two A-Frames in Sugarloaf Valley. With only six weeks to accomplish both renovations, Chase splits the team down the middle. A friendly wager allows the winning team to dress the losing team up at dinner.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Teaching an Old Cabin New Tricks
programme.desc: For the past 20 years, a family has created lasting memories of their cabin overlooking Harpswell Sound, but the cabin is in need of some work to see the next 20 years and beyond.

programme.title: Man v. Food: St. Louis, MO
programme.desc: Casey Webb visits St. Louis, Missouri, in search of the biggest and best the city has to offer. He encounters a four-pound meatball and tackles a New York-style pizza so massive he'll need the help of a partner to take it down.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Los Angeles, California
programme.desc: Casey travels to sunny Los Angeles for some epic eats including a 2.5-pound fusion burrito loaded with every ingredient in the kitchen and drenched in hot sauce 600 times hotter than a jalapeno.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Philadelphia, Pa
programme.desc: Casey Webb sails to Philadelphia to tackle the epic Classic Whale Challenge, a 13-pound bagel sandwich stuffed with cream cheese, nova salmon, whitefish, tomatoes and onions.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Atlanta, Ga
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country culinary crusade brings him to Atlanta for a decadent doughnut brunch, beastly barbecue and a five-pound mountain of tater tot nachos.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Maui, Hi
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Hawaii, where he embraces the aloha spirit and takes on a whopping three-and-a-half-pound burger.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Duluth, MN
programme.desc: Casey heads to Duluth, Minnesota, where he tastes the city's best fish fry, visits a specialty sandwich shop and attempts to finish a three-pound platter of pie and ice cream in 20 minutes or less.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Berry Delicious
programme.desc: Berries might be little but they're full of huge flavor, just like the seven berry sweet dishes Noah will be sampling in this episode. Noah will so discover that berries are good on everything.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Get Stuffed
programme.desc: This is an episode stuffed with foods that are stuffed. From spicy southern stuffed peppers to a sweet cherry stuffed dessert, Noah will indulge in some of the best stuffed sensations North America has to offer.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The French Toast Connection
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the San Diego County fair in California, for breakfast with a bang, indulging in French toast bacon bombs.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Million Dollar Baby Cakes
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the annual Rio Rancho Pork and Brew festival in New Mexico.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Garlic's Angels
programme.desc: Noah Cappe packs his breath mints and heads to the South Florida Garlic Festival in Delray Beach, Fla., where the stinking rose makes an appearance in fair foods like the claw cake burger and mojo pork pockets.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Dates on a Plane
programme.desc: Noah Cappe arrives in the California desert for a date with deliciousness at the Riverside County Fair and National Date Festival. He tries spicy treats like the fire fingers kartwheel and the sonoran fire dog.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Flavor Mashups
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson finds that marrying different dishes to create something new is a genius life hack. Whether it's a combination of cultures or a surprising mix of your favorite flavors, a good mashup is an exciting way to bring your meal to the next level.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Asian Sensations
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson explores a world of flavors and an all-time favorite, Asian cuisine. Whether sweet or spicy, classics or fusions, there's always something new to try when it comes to Asian sensations.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: In the Last Place You'd Expect
programme.desc: Sometimes the best dishes are in the last place you'd ever expect to find them. We've scoured the globe, searched far and wide, and the hunt stops here. Alex Guarnaschelli ends the debate over where to find the best bagel -- it's in North Yarmouth, Maine!

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Desert Island Dish
programme.desc: Mayday! Mayday! The chefs and foodies are stranded on a desert island with nothing but an appetite, and they're sharing the one dish they simply can't live without.

programme.title: Southern and Hungry: Southern Fried Georgia
programme.desc: In Atlanta, Georgia, the Southern staples shine. We find unbelievable breakfast at a gas station, with legendary sausages and fried pork chops.

programme.title: Southern and Hungry: A Whole Beast of Flavor
programme.desc: Damaris Phillips and NASCAR personality Rutledge Wood sop up the sauce in Charleston, S.C., as they discover the pleasures of whole hog barbecue with legendary pitmaster, Rodney Scott. Then they are on to one of the best burgers in America.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Luck of the Irish
programme.desc: Bobby's recent trip to the Emerald Isle was clearly on his mind, when he came up with his succulent and savory Irish style brunch menu. Bobby creates a bountiful family style platter filled with some of Ireland's favorites.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: A French Countryside Picnic
programme.desc: Bobby Flay's in the mood for a brunch-style picnic in the style of the French countryside.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Breakfast in Bed
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay is preparing a 'breakfast in bed' style brunch. Bobby wines and dines in bed with an indulgent menu of baked eggs with prosciutto, candied tomatoes and herb parmesan cream, and chocolate covered berries.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Waffles Gone Wild
programme.desc: Ordinary waffles be warned: Chef Bobby Flay has your number! Bobby wows with a menu of unexpected waffle creations like Cornbread Waffles with Ranch Style Eggs & Cilantro Crema and Glazed Waffle Donuts!

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Hot and Spicy
programme.desc: Michael Symon digs into a spicy burger that uses four different types of peppers to fire up even the most adventurous eaters in Hell's Kitchen, New York City, before heading to Nashville, where he finds Southern comforts infused with Latin flavors.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smoked and Stacked
programme.desc: Duff Goldman makes a guest appearance at Michael Symon's favorite Baton Rouge, La. smokehouse that boasts a pork belly hoagie so outrageous it has to be shared. Next up in St. Louis, a big fat Greek burger ignites Michael's cultural soul, and in Austin.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Sweet and Savory
programme.desc: Scott Conant shows Michael his favourite burger and brew bar in an out-of-the-way corner of New Orleans, and then in Kansas City, Michael learns how two brother have stormed the classic barbecue scene with their award winning smoked meat.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Hot, Charred and Crispy
programme.desc: Cooking Channel's Haylie Duff joins Michael Symon at one of his most treasured New Orleans spots.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Small Town to Farmville
programme.desc: Noah Cappe travels to the Nederland Heritage Festival, where food from around the world is prepared by an army of volunteers. From the cowboy pistolettes to sopapillas to chicken fried bacon and a very fun egg-stravaganza, see all the delicious delights.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Crawfish to California
programme.desc: Noah Cappe goes coastal at the Louisiana Crawfish Festival.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Chowchilla-Madera to Ciao!
programme.desc: In the tiny town of Chowchilla, CA Noah Cappe discovers some carnival eats that deserve to be shared with the world. First up, it's the Deep Pit Barbeque, a meat extravaganza that takes three days to prepare.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Clams and Cannoli
programme.desc: Mouthwatering midway munchies are on the menu at the Delaware County Fair in Walton, N.Y., where Noah Cappe goes wild for the spaghizza, packs on the pork with freshman 15 fries, snaps to attention for the veteran's clams n' corn.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Mac and Cheese and Monster Meat
programme.desc: Noah takes a bite out of the Great New York State Fair where The Defibrillator gets his heart pumping. Then he tries on two local favorites -- the piquant Buffalo chicken mac and cheese and the crispy clamwich.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Shepherd's Pie and Sunday Dinner Sundaes
programme.desc: Noah Cappe kicks things off at the Big E in West Springfield, Mass., where he 'meats up' with a deconstructed Turducken Sandwich and the award-winning country fried shepherd's pie.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Portland, OR
programme.desc: Casey heads to Portland, Oregon, to taste mouth-watering Peruvian chicken, a succulent porchetta sandwich and a two-pound burrito packed with ten of the spiciest peppers in the world.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Chicago, IL
programme.desc: Casey travels to Chicago for some epic Windy City eats, including a massive triple-threat pork sandwich and a challenge featuring a two-pound double bacon cheeseburger and two pounds of 'Irish Nacho' cheese fries.

programme.desc: After racking up a huge bill at Pumpers, SwaySway and Buhdeuce level up into Diner Ducks to pay off their debt. Things get awkward when the guys eat a loaf of Switcheroo Bread and swap bodies.

programme.desc: SwaySway and Buhdeuce become obsessed with winning a toy out of the new crane game that's been installed in Pumpers. Buhdeuce goes berserk when he gets a new haircut.

programme.title: Breadwinners: TNT-Midi/ Poltergoose
programme.desc: SwaySway and Buhdeuce deliver the wrong bread to T-Midi. A poltergoose makes trouble when it possesses the rocket van.

programme.title: Breadwinners: Introducktions/ Fowl Feud
programme.desc: SwaySway and Buhdeuce head deep into the bread mines to introduce their number one customer to the one and only bread maker! After breaking each other's favourite possessions, SwaySway and Buhdeuce get into a feud that might last forever!

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig: The Giving G/ Release the Craigan
programme.desc: An amazing discovery at the junkyard causes trouble in the neighbourhood. Craig steals Megan's identity and becomes a pageant queen.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig: Muscle C.O.P.S./ Cold Hard Cash
programme.desc: Sanjay grows giant calf muscles and joins a peculiar police force.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig: Unbarfable/ Game On
programme.desc: Sanjay and Craig vow to make Hector barf for the first time ever and the search is on when Sanjay and Craig's favourite video game goes AWOL.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig: Doom Baby/ Laked Nake
programme.desc: The dudes' decision to babysit Richard Dickson might cost Craig his life. A good day at the lake goes bad when Sanjay loses his bathing suit.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig: Family Re-Noodman/ Blackout
programme.desc: The boys infiltrate Noodman's reunion in hopes of tasting special Frycade wings. When the lights go out, Sanjay becomes the most powerful kid in town.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Fury: Lost Signal
programme.desc: The Rangers intercept a mysterious message from outer space and Zayto is desperate to know if it was sent from his home planet. Unable to decipher it and losing hope, he remembers another important message from the past.

programme.title: The Loud House: Stage Plight/ Antiqued Off
programme.desc: Hoping to get closer to her crush, Benny, Luan tries out for the school play. When Clyde and schoolmate Zach bond over antiques, Lincoln finds himself feeling like a third wheel.

programme.title: The Loud House: Everybody Loves Leni/ Middle Men
programme.desc: Torn between her work friends and her school friends, Leni tries to bring everyone together. When Lincoln and Clyde go to tour the middle school, Lynn gives them some questionable advice.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Walk the Prank: WWE Edition
programme.desc: WWE superstars join the cast of professional pranksters to pull off some of the most outrageous pranks yet including staging a fake infomercial fiasco, making an arm wrestling video game come to life, and turning a house upside down.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Substitute Dad
programme.desc: A team of young practical jokers pull off hilarious pranks in this hidden camera series.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Ferb Latin/ Lotsa Latkes
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb create their own language, Ferb Latin, which quickly catches on. Then, when all of the potatoes in Danville go missing, Phineas and Ferb decide to clone some using Buford's last potato chip, with unexpected consequences.

programme.title: The Owl House: Hooty's Moving Hassle
programme.desc: When Luz, Willow and Gus accidentally animate the Owl House, the house runs amok around Bonesborough.

programme.title: Amphibia: Marcy at the Gates
programme.desc: The family must defeat an entire ant army before they enter Newtopia.

programme.title: Amphibia: Snow Day/ Cracking Mrs. Croaker
programme.desc: When a winter cold snap freezes all the frogs in Wartwood, Anne must protect the townspeople. In an effort to make Mrs. Croaker like him, Sprig digs up a secret from her past.

programme.title: DuckTales: Beaks in the Shell!
programme.desc: Huey struggles to keep Fenton and Gandra’s top secret experiment (and their relationship) hidden from the world. Mark Beaks is desperate for one last gizmo to steal.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Mayor for a Day/The Dog Craze of Summer
programme.desc: Hiro, Baymax and the rest of the Big Hero 6 team continue their journey to San Fransokyo.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Northwest Mansion Mystery
programme.desc: Pacifica asks Dipper to bust a poltergeist haunting the Northwest Mansion, before he wreaks havoc on her fancy party.

programme.title: Parker Plays: The Return of the Parker
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne or Beast?/ Best Fronds
programme.desc: Sprig tries to capture a mysterious beast to prove that he's responsible; Sprig takes Anne swimming in a nearby lake to help her feel less homesick.

programme.title: Amphibia: Dating Season / Anne vs. Wild
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Where's Perry?
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb embark on an African safari vacation while their loyal pet platypus Perry stays back in Danville to handle a Dr. Doofenshmirtz emergency.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Where's Perry?
programme.desc: With Agent P nowhere in sight, Dr. Doofenshmirtz and Major Monogram square off against evil Carl who controls a set of Flynn-Fletcher robots to take over the OWCA, in one of the biggest battles yet.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Summerween
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel are excited to join in on the fun, but when Wendy casually mentions that trick-or-treating is for kids, Dipper's whole outlook on the evening changes. Dipper accidentally insults a monster who makes him fill his candy quota or be eaten.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Bottomless Pit!
programme.desc: When Stan, Dipper, Mabel and Soos find themselves falling into a bottomless pit, they each decide to tell a different story to pass the time.

programme.title: The Owl House: Really Small Problems
programme.desc: King confides in a carnival fortune teller who makes his dream come true, but it comes at a cost.

programme.title: The Owl House: Once Upon a Swap
programme.desc: A simple disagreement leads to a complex situation when Eda, King, and Luz triple-down on a wager.

programme.title: Amphibia: Croak and Punishment/ Trip to the Archives
programme.desc: When Sprig's Blue Moon Shell is stolen, he and Anne investigate to find the crook. To prepare for Anne's quest, the Plantars go to the archives and accidentally get trapped!

programme.title: Amphibia: The Domino Effect / Taking Charge
programme.desc: Anne wants to keep a caterpillar as a pet, but she'll have to keep it a secret from Hop Pop; After one of the Plantars mysteriously runs out the charge on Anne's phone, the family embarks on a mission to try and recharge it.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Major Blast
programme.desc: Fred is targeted when a new villain, Major Blast appears in the city.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Hiro The Villain
programme.desc: Momakase blackmails Hiro into helping her steal her family's knives from Yama's safe.

programme.title: MECH-X4: Let's Call It MECH-X4!, Part 1
programme.desc: A giant robot built to defend a city against doom is awoken and monsters begin to descend.

programme.title: MECH-X4: Let's Call It MECH-X4!, Part 2
programme.desc: Ryan and the team attempt to show Bay City that they’re truly heroes and to find themselves targeted by a ferocious new monster.

programme.title: MECH-X4: Let's Get Some Air!
programme.desc: When an ooze-infected Harris starts turning into a monster, the team goes on a mission to find a cure.

programme.title: MECH-X4: Let's Open the Monster Heart!
programme.desc: Ryan uses his 'technopathic' powers to access a powerful laser for the team to use and crack open the captive monster's heart.

programme.title: MECH-X4: Let's Be Idiots!
programme.desc: As enemies secretly close in on the team, Ryan battles his nemesis in a skating competition.

programme.title: MECH-X4: Let's Survive in the Woods!
programme.desc: Principal Grey sets a trap for Ryan, Harris and Spyder while they're on a camping trip, which leaves MECH-X4 and Mark in danger.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Kapowie! / Car Trouble
programme.desc: Cricket earns a role in Big Coffee’s new TV commercial but loses his confidence. Bill trades his pickup in for a cutting-edge electric car, but gets more than he bargained for.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Photo Op/ Remy Rescue
programme.desc: Bill promises his family a trip to the mall food court but tricks them into going to a family portrait studio. Remy skips his violin lesson to hang out with Cricket.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Hiya Henry/ People Watching
programme.desc: Tilly tries ventriloquism for the Big Coffee open mic, but her dummy terrifies Cricket. The family plays the people watching game, making up stories about city folk passing by.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Present Tense/ Hurt Bike
programme.desc: Cricket struggles to get the best birthday present for his best friend, Remy. After almost getting in a dirt bike accident, Cricket decides to live his life in shelter.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Ballad of Hopediah Plantar/ Anne Hunter
programme.desc: Hop Pop's efforts to be hailed as a hero amongst some small-town folks backfires when he stands up to the wrong family. Then, when the family is in danger, Anne must put her self-consciousness aside in order to learn the true way of the hunter.

programme.title: Amphibia: Swamp and Sensibility/ Wax Museum
programme.desc: When Anne discovers an old friend who has been living a double life, she becomes fixated on helping him be his true self. The family visits a mysterious roadside oddities museum where every treasure comes with a price.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Baymax Returns Part I and II
programme.desc: Join Hiro right after he learns that Baymax is lost in the portal forever. He discovers the chip that Tadashi designed to create Baymax. Hiro begins school as the new prodigy at San Fransokyo Institute of Technology and sets out to rebuild Baymax.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Killer App
programme.desc: Wasabi’s need for order clashes with Hiro’s chaotic work style when they collaborate on a school project. They must learn to respect and embrace their differences to save the day.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: The Hyper-potamus Pizza-Party-torium
programme.desc: Hiro’s faith in his friends starts to fray when they show up late to a mission. Hiro and a short-handed Big Hero 6 must attempt to stop Noodle Burger Boy and his new sisters.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Something Fluffy
programme.desc: When mysterious but adorable creatures called Mayoi suddenly appear in San Fransokyo, Hiro is convinced that they’re part of some nefarious plot by Liv Amara.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: A Fresh Sparkles / Noodle Burger Ploy
programme.desc: When Big Hero 6 find Mr. Sparkles working at the Pizza Party-torium, he tells them he’s decided to leave the world of crime behind. Noodle Burger Boy and the mascots abduct Fred.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: K-Nein/ Bromance
programme.desc: Kick rescues an injured stray dog, but when he discovers she's a safety dog, trained to prevent accidents, Kick must decide between keeping the dog and being a daredevil.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Switching Gears/ Garage Banned
programme.desc: Kick's bike is badly damaged hours before the annual BMX Rodeo. The competition gets fierce when Kick decides to ride the Mustang Menace, a supposedly untameable bike. Brad forms a band and takes over the garage, so Kick decides to form his own band.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Runaway Recital/ Trike X-5
programme.desc: Kick's dad forces him to learn the piano, but Kick decides to turn it into a stunt that spans the whole town. Kick's sister steals his first stunt bike and turns it into a girly bike.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Gym Dandy/ Detained
programme.desc: Kick tries out for the school's sports teams, but causes chaos when he has trouble following Coach Sternbeck's rules. Then, Kick must team up with some unlikely allies to bring down the new Vice Principal and escape detention.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Morning Rush/ A Fistful of Ice Cream
programme.desc: In order to not fail the school year, Kick has one night to complete all of his missed homework assignments; To give his dad the best birthday gift ever, Kick tracks down a rare ice cream treat.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Snowpolcalypse!/ According to Chimp
programme.desc: Kick causes the school bus to get trapped during a blizzard. Later, Kick brings home a lost chimp named Dr. Awesome and makes it his new pet. Kick soon realizes that the apparently cute little primate becomes destructive without chocolate bananas.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Rising Ferocity! Tag Battle!
programme.desc: Fresh off the back of their first win, the Victories move on to the tag battle stage of their ultimate showdown against Team Inferno. After his previous defeat, Dante is hungry for a rematch against Gwyn. But who will fight by his side? Delta or Arman?

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb Get Busted
programme.desc: Candace has finally busted her brothers and sent away to Smile Away Reformatory School. How long can Candace enjoy her summer with Jeremy and Stacy instead of her usual routine?

programme.desc: Commercial jingle writer Charlie Harper is surprised when his uptight brother, Alan, and Alan's 10-year-old son Jake ask to stay temporarily with him at his beach house. Charlie soon bonds with Jake, and the temporary arrangement becomes more permanent.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Big Flappy Bastards
programme.desc: Charlie gives Jake the cold shoulder after he lures seagulls into the house. Meanwhile, Alan gets a surprise from Judith when he offers to fix her sprinklers.

programme.title: The World's Funniest Weather: We Interrupt This Weathercast
programme.desc: A meteorologist reveals a little too much about what she does in private, a guy clearing snow off his roof gets buried in his work, and a wayward pinata stick unfortunately hits the wrong bag of goodies.

programme.title: The World's Funniest Weather: Poolish Behaviour
programme.desc: A weather reporter gets an unexpected on-set visit from a canine guest, a goat delivers a surprise facial, and a woman finds out that a blustery day and a large glass door are a bad combination.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior: Las Vegas Finals

programme.title: Mike & Molly: The Last Temptation of Mike
programme.desc: Guilt sets in for Mike when he flirts with a rookie cop and she reciprocates.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Support Your Local Samuel
programme.desc: Samuel contemplates moving back to Africa when he receives a letter from his parents saying they're struggling financially.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Keep the Change
programme.desc: When Mike and Vanessa invite Jen's father to her graduation, Jen struggles with accepting his 'plus one' his girlfriend, Fiona.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Garage Band
programme.desc: A car restoration article throws Mike, Chuck and Ed into the spotlight while leaving Joe feeling unappreciated. Meanwhile, Ryan overacts after taking Kyle's psych test.

programme.title: 26th Annual Critics' Choice Awards
programme.desc: Taye Diggs hosts the 26th annual Critics Choice Awards, honouring the best in cinematic and televised/streaming achievement.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Stranded
programme.desc: Elaine and Jerry are left stranded at a party after George goes home with his date.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Statue
programme.desc: Elaine talks Jerry into hiring a friend who is paying for college by house cleaning.

programme.title: Mom: Six Thousand Bootleg T-Shirts and a Prada Handbag
programme.desc: Christy makes a new friend who has big problems. Meanwhile, Bonnie attempts to put someone else's needs ahead of her own.

programme.title: Mom: Abstinence and Pudding
programme.desc: Christy is determined to take things slow in her relationship with Adam. Meanwhile, Bonnie and her rival from AA, Marjorie, disagree on what 'taking it slow' means.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Planes, Fingers and Automobiles
programme.desc: When Max decides to head to Los Angeles to win back Randy, she and Caroline embark on a cross-country road trip with Han at the wheel. Also, while Han and the girls are away, Oleg takes charge of the diner and Sophie fills in as a waitress.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Riverboat Runs Through It
programme.desc: As Max and Caroline's road trip misadventures continue, their lack of money finds them stowing away and waitressing on a riverboat in New Orleans as Max tries to reach Randy in Texas. Back at the diner, Oleg and Sophie rake in big bucks on pony rides.

programme.title: Major Crimes: #FindKaylaWeber
programme.desc: A professional baseball pitcher's daughter goes missing, and the Major Crimes team's investigation leads them to the very limits of the justice system. Rusty is put in an extremely awkward position as Slider approaches the last phase of his trial.

programme.title: Monk: Mr. Monk and the Sharona
programme.desc: Sharona Fleming stops by to visit her former employer while dealing with the legal matters involving her uncle's accidental death, but Monk soon begins to suspect that accident was anything but.

programme.title: Entertainers With Byron Allen
programme.desc: Segment features Jamie Foxx, Dolly Parton, Isla Fisher, Nicolas Cage, the stars of ‘Yearly Departed’, Phillipa Soo, Kristin Key, Marsha Stephanie Blake, John Legend, Rose Byrne and Katy Perry.

programme.title: America's Court With Judge Ross: Doggy Afternoon/ Ticket to Tow
programme.desc: Woman sues for damages to car and cost of phone; woman sues neighbor for fees.

programme.title: The Verdict With Judge Hatchett: Crazy Event Crashing/ Who Let the Cat Out?
programme.desc: Man sues for value of after-party ticket and hotel; man sued for pet finding fees.

programme.title: Protection Court: Asking for a Friend/ OK to Drop off Mom?
programme.desc: Judge Carroll Kelly advocates for the victims of crime by being tough, but fair.

programme.title: Ask Dr. LaViola
programme.desc: Dr. Jamie LaViola discusses how improvements to your smile can make a big difference. Don't let your fear of the dentist, or being too busy, keep you away from the smile you've always wanted.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Spider Rent Special
programme.desc: A man sues for medical bills from a spider bite.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Curtis vs. Buckley
programme.desc: After a previous New Year's Eve proposal, a relationship deteriorated when a 32-year-old Arkansas man began doubting he fathered a 22-month-old baby.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Bido vs. Bolton
programme.desc: A hidden love letter led a Georgia man to question if he or his girlfriend's ex is the father of her 11-month-old son.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: The plaintiff wants her money back for a car sale that soured days later. Then, the defendant failed to repair the plaintiff's bike; he agreed to the labour, but not to buying the parts needed.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: A son is suing his mother for an unpaid bill and says he does not approve of his mother’s boyfriend because he’s a freeloader and talks about other women behind her back.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'Not Being a Model Client' and 'You're a Double-Crosser.'

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'Not Doing Things Right' and 'Burning Things Up.'

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Gambling Debt/ Don't Go Breaking My Art
programme.desc: Judge Mablean Ephriam handles justice her way.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Jenn is suing Maria after a T-bone care accident, but Maria says it was Jenna who was irresponsible. Then, Nicole is suing Glenn for a security deposit for an apartment she never moved into, but Glenn says she knew it was non-refundable.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Cheat to Save Our Relationship
programme.desc: Constance says her boyfriend Aki has recently posted pictures on social media of him at a hotel with another woman. Plus, Dwayne suspects Taylor of cheating on him while he is at work.

programme.title: Maury: I've Waited 20 Years to Prove Your Three Kids Are Not Mine!
programme.desc: Tina is hoping that a DNA test will tell her if Lloyd is her biological father, and if Patrick is her biological brother. Plus, Tammy returns to the show because her ex-husband has been denying her three children for decades.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Pregnant and Pissed
programme.desc: Ajia says her boyfriend John’s past is coming back to haunt her. She’s six months pregnant with their child and but wants to know why he’s flirting with his female friend Hailey.
